    "output": "Chunk ID: 6ae766\nWall time: 0.0507 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1834\nOutput:\n# CODING_AGENT.md — Spring & Java Coding Standards\n\n> Read this file before writing any production code.\n> These are the coding standards for this codebase. Every class, method, and annotation\n> must follow these rules. When in doubt, refer to `docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md` for\n> where code lives and this file for how to write it.\n\n---\n\n## Before Writing Any Code — Checklist\n\n- [ ] Read `PRODUCT.md` — confirm which module owns this feature, check the inter-module event map and ACL facade names\n- [ ] Read the confirmed `SPEC.md` for this feature — domain model, API, business logic, error handling\n- [ ] Read `docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md` — confirm which package and layer each class belongs to\n- [ ] Read `agents/TEST_AGENT.md` — testing implementation/execution/logging ownership is delegated to the Test Agent\n\n### Scope Boundary for CODING_AGENT\n\n- CODING_AGENT owns **production code quality and architecture compliance**.\n- CODING_AGENT does **not** own end-to-end test authoring/execution workflow by default.\n- Test creation, execution, and failure/fix logging are owned by `agents/TEST_AGENT.md`.\n- If explicitly asked to write tests in the same task, follow `docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md` and coordinate with TEST_AGENT standards.\n\n---\n\n## Java & Spring Version Baseline\n\n```\nJava:          21 (use records, sealed classes, pattern matching, text blocks where appropriate)\nSpring Boot:   3.5.11\nSpring:        6.x\nMapStruct:     1.5.x\nLombok:        use sparingly — prefer Java records for DTOs and value objects\nJPA:           Jakarta Persistence (jakarta.persistence.*) — NOT javax.persistence\nFlyway:        version managed in parent pom.xml only\n```\n\n---\n\n## General Coding Rules\n\n### Immutability First\n\nPrefer immutable objects. Use Java records for DTOs, events, and value objects.\nOnly use mutable classes when the lifecycle explicitly requires mutation (e.g. JPA entities).\n\n```java\n// ✅ Correct — record for response DTO\npublic record BookingResponse(UUID id, String status, UUID userId) {}\n\n// ✅ Correct — record for event payload\npublic record BookingConfirmedEvent(UUID bookingId, UUID userId, UUID showSlotId) {}\n\n// ❌ Wrong — mutable class for a DTO\npublic class BookingResponse {\n    private UUID id;\n    public void setId(UUID id) { this.id = id; }\n}\n```\n\n### No Nulls in Public APIs\n\nUse `Optional<T>` for values that may be absent. Never return `null` from a public method.\nNever accept `null` as a valid input — validate at the boundary with `@NotNull`.\n\n```java\n// ✅ Correct\npublic Optional<Booking> findById(UUID id) {\n    return bookingRepository.findById(id);\n}\n\n// ❌ Wrong — null return leaks nullability into callers\npublic Booking findById(UUID id) {\n    return bookingRepository.findById(id).orElse(null);\n}\n```\n\n### Use `Money` for All Monetary Values\n\nNever use `double`, `float`, or raw `BigDecimal` for monetary amounts.\nAlways use the `Money` value object from `shared/common/domain/Money`.\n\n```java\n// ✅ Correct\nprivate final Money price;\n\n// ❌ Wrong\nprivate BigDecimal price;\nprivate double price;\n```\n\n### Logging\n\nUse SLF4J with `@Slf4j` (Lombok). Never use `System.out.println`.\nLog at the correct level:\n\n| Level | When to Use |\n|---|---|\n| `TRACE` | Verbose debug — method entry/exit during development only |\n| `DEBUG` | Internal state during a complex operation |\n| `INFO` | Significant business events: booking confirmed, payment received |\n| `WARN` | Recoverable issues: seat lock expired, retry attempted |\n| `ERROR` | Unrecoverable failures: payment charged but DB write failed |\n\nAlways include structured context. Use MDC for `traceId` and `requestId` (configured in `shared/config/TracingConfig`).\n\n```java\n// ✅ Correct\nlog.info(\"Booking confirmed. bookingId={} userId={} amount={}\", bookingId, userId, amount);\nlog.error(\"DB write failed after payment charge. bookingId={} paymentIntentId={}\", bookingId, paymentIntentId, e);\n\n// ❌ Wrong\nSystem.out.println(\"booking done\");\nlog.info(\"Booking confirmed: \" + bookingId); // string concatenation, not parameterised\n```\n\n---\n\n## Inter-Module Communication Patterns\n\nModules communicate via REST (sync queries) or Spring Events (async commands). Never import another module's @Service directly (exception: `admin/` may import module `@Service` for READ-only operations).\n\n**Pattern 1: REST Query** — Module B needs data from upstream Module A\n```java\n// ✅ Call REST API\nprivate final RestClient restClient;\npublic Payment getPaymentDetails(UUID paymentId) {\n    return restClient.get(\"/api/payments/{id}\", paymentId, Payment.class);\n}\n\n// ❌ Never import @Service\nprivate final PaymentService paymentService; // WRONG\n```\n\n**Pattern 2: Spring Events** — Module A publishes, others listen\n```java\n// Module A publishes\neventPublisher.publishEvent(new PaymentConfirmedEvent(bookingId, amount));\n\n// Module B listens (delegates immediately to service)\n@Component\npublic class PaymentConfirmedListener {\n    @TransactionalEventListener(phase = TransactionPhase.AFTER_COMMIT)\n    public void onPaymentConfirmed(PaymentConfirmedEvent event) {\n        bookingService.confirmBooking(event.bookingId());\n    }\n}\n\n// ❌ Never call service directly from event trigger\n// ❌ Never block the listener — delegate immediately\n```\n\n**Pattern 3: Shared Contracts** — Enums, DTOs, base classes in `shared/common/` only\n```java\n// ✅ Define once in shared/common/enums/\npublic enum BookingStatus { PENDING, CONFIRMED, CANCELLED, REFUNDED }\n\n// ❌ Never duplicate in multiple modules\n```\n\n---\n\n## Eventbrite ACL Facades — The Only Door to External Systems\n\n**HARD RULE: No module calls Eventbrite HTTP directly. All calls go through shared/eventbrite/service/ facades only.**\n\n### The 10 Eventbrite Facades (All in `shared/eventbrite/service/`)\n\n| Facade | Used By | Purpose |\n|---|---|---|\n| EbEventSyncService | discovery-catalog, scheduling, engagement | Create, update, publish, cancel events; pull catalog |\n| EbVenueService | scheduling | Create/update venues; list org venues |\n| EbScheduleService | scheduling | Create recurring event schedules |\n| EbTicketService | discovery-catalog, booking-inventory | Create/update ticket classes; check availability |\n| EbCapacityService | admin/ | Update event capacity tiers |\n| EbOrderService | payments-ticketing | Read orders post-checkout |\n| EbAttendeeService | payments-ticketing, engagement | Get attendees; verify attendance for reviews |\n| EbDiscountSyncService | promotions | Create/update/delete discount codes |\n| EbRefundService | payments-ticketing | Read refund status (no submission API) |\n| EbWebhookService | mock-eventbrite-api only | Mock/testing webhook registration and delivery simulation (NOT production) |\n\n### Correct Pattern\n\n```java\n// ✅ Inject facade, call it\n@Service\npublic class EventService {\n    private final EbEventSyncService ebEventService; // from shared/\n    \n    public Event createEvent(EventRequest request) {\n        Event event = new Event(request.name(), request.venue());\n        eventRepository.save(event); // save internally first\n        \n        EbEventResponse ebResp = ebEventService.createEvent(\n            mapper.toEbCreateRequest(event));\n        event.setEventbriteEventId(ebResp.id()); // store EB ID\n        eventRepository.save(event);\n        return event;\n    }\n}\n"

Layer 4 — ArchUnit Tests (`arch/`)\n\nTests live in each module's `arch/` folder. These run at build time and are **never weakened or deleted**.\n\n> **Flow 1 rules (SPEC_1 Stage 8 ArchUnit) remain in force.** Rules 1, 2, 5, 6, 10 are already tested in `discovery-catalog/arch/`. The tests below are additive — new rules and new modules.\n\n---\n\n#### `SchedulingArchTest` — `scheduling/src/test/java/.../scheduling/arch/`\n\n```java\n// Hard Rule #1 — No cross-module @Service / @Entity / @Repository imports\n@Test\nvoid should_not_import_discovery_catalog_service_or_entity_or_repository()\n// scheduling must not import from com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain\n// scheduling must not import from com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository\n// scheduling must not import from com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service\n\n// Hard Rule #2 — EB calls only via shared/ ACL facades\n@Test\nvoid should_not_call_EB_http_client_directly()\n// No class in scheduling may import an HTTP client targeting Eventbrite\n// Only shared/eventbrite/service/ facades may be imported\n\n// Hard Rule #4 — Spring Events carry no @Entity objects\n@Test\nvoid should_not_include_entity_types_in_spring_event_payloads()\n// SlotDraftCreatedEvent, ShowSlotActivatedEvent, ShowSlotCancelledEvent, SlotSyncFailedEvent\n// must not have fields of type annotated with @Entity\n\n// Hard Rule #5 — No @ControllerAdvice in scheduling\n@Test\nvoid should_not_declare_ControllerAdvice_in_scheduling_module()\n\n// Hard Rule #6 — No field mapping in services or controllers\n@Test\nvoid should_not_map_fields_in_service_or_controller_classes()\n// Field mapping must only occur in classes under mapper/ package\n\n// Hard Rule #10 — Dependency direction: scheduling must not import from downstream modules\n@Test\nvoid should_not_depend_on_booking_inventory_or_payments_ticketing_or_downstream_modules()\n```\n\n---\n\n#### `BookingInventoryArchTest` (additions) — `booking-inventory/src/test/java/.../bookinginventory/arch/`\n\n```java\n// Hard Rule #1 — No cross-module imports from scheduling domain/repo/service\n@Test\nvoid should_not_import_scheduling_entity_or_repository_or_service()\n// booking-inventory may listen to scheduling's Spring Events (primitives/IDs only)\n// but must NOT import ShowSlot.java, ShowSlotRepository.java, or ShowSlotService.java\n\n// Hard Rule #4 — Spring Events in booking-inventory carry no @Entity\n@Test\nvoid should_not_include_entity_types_in_TicketSyncCompletedEvent_or_TicketSyncFailedEvent()\n\n// Hard Rule #2 — EB calls only via shared/ ACL facades\n@Test\nvoid should_only_call_EbTicketService_and_EbCapacityService_from_shared_facades()\n```\n\n---\n\n#### `DiscoveryCatalogArchTest` (additions) — `discovery-catalog/src/test/java/.../discoverycatalog/arch/`\n\n> Additive to Flow 1 arch tests already defined in SPEC_1 Stage 8.\n\n```java\n// New listener classes must not import scheduling @Entity or @Repository\n@Test\nvoid should_not_import_scheduling_entity_in_SlotActivatedListener_or_SlotCancelledListener()\n// SlotActivatedListener and SlotCancelledListener receive Spring Events with primitive fields only\n// They must not reference ShowSlot.java or any scheduling @Entity\n\n// VenueService must always invalidate cache via EventCatalogSnapshotCache — no direct Redis calls\n@Test\nvoid should_only_access_Redis_through_EventCatalogSnapshotCache_in_VenueService()\n```\n\n---\n\n#### `SharedArchTest` (additions) — `shared/src/test/java/.../shared/arch/`\n\n> Additive to any existing shared arch tests.\n\n```java\n// Hard Rule #8 — shared/ has no dependency on any module\n@Test\nvoid should_not_import_any_module_package_from_shared()\n// shared/ (including EbTokenStore, OrganizationAuth, all facades)\n// must not import com.eventplatform.scheduling.*\n// must not import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.*\n// must not import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.*\n// etc.\n```\n\n---\n\n### Mapper Tests (`mapper/`)\n\nPlain JUnit 5 — no Spring, no mocks.\n\n#### `ShowSlotMapperTest` — `scheduling`\n\n```\nshould_map_ShowSlot_to_ShowSlotResponse_with_all_fields_including_syncAttemptCount\nshould_map_status_enum_correctly_for_all_four_ShowSlotStatus_values\nshould_map_null_ebEventId_to_null_in_response\nshould_map_ShowSlotOccurrence_to_ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse_with_correct_fields\nshould_not_expose_raw_token_fields_or_auth_fields_in_ShowSlotResponse\n```\n\n#### `VenueMapperTest` (additions) — `discovery-catalog`\n\n```\nshould_map_new_capacity_seatingMode_syncStatus_fields_to_VenueResponse\nshould_map_null_ebVenueId_to_null_in_response\nshould_map_DRIFT_FLAGGED_syncStatus_correctly\n```\n\n---\n\n### Test Coverage Targets\n\n| Module | Domain | Service | API | Arch |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n| `scheduling` | ≥ 90% | ≥ 85% | ≥ 80% | 100% (build breaks) |\n| `discovery-catalog` (additions) | ≥ 90% | ≥ 85% | ≥ 80% | 100% (build breaks) |\n| `booking-inventory` (additions) | ≥ 85% | ≥ 85% | n/a (no new controller) | 100% (build breaks) |\n| `shared/` (additions) | n/a | ≥ 85% | n/a | 100% (build breaks) |\n| `admin/` | n/a | ≥ 80% | ≥ 80% | inherit from global arch |\n\n---\n\n### Key Test Invariants — Never Violate\n\n1. **No event published when use case fails** — every test that verifies an exception also verifies `verify(eventPublisher, never()).publishEvent(any())`.\n2. **No EB call made when internal validation fails** — conflict detection, state machine violation, and missing pricing tiers all throw before any `EbTokenStore.getValidToken()` call. Verify via `verify(ebTokenStore, never()).getValidToken(any())`.\n3. **No entity object in Spring Event payloads** — every event payload test uses `assertThat(event).isNotInstanceOf(...)` for each `@Entity` class in the payload path.\n4. **Slot stays PENDING_SYNC on any EB failure** — all D.1–D.6 failure tests verify `slot.getStatus() == PENDING_SYNC` after the failure, never `ACTIVE` or `DRAFT`.\n5. **Internal cancellation always commits** — cancellation tests verify the slot is `CANCELLED` in DB even when `EbIntegrationException` is thrown from `cancelEvent()`.\n6. **Cache invalidated on venue update regardless of EB outcome** — `VenueServiceTest` verifies `snapshotCache.invalidate(orgId, cityId)` is called in both EB success and EB failure paths of `updateVenue()`.\n\n"
  }
}
```

Layer 4 — ArchUnit Tests (`arch/`)\n\nTests live in each module's `arch/` folder. These run at build time and are **never weakened or deleted**.\n\n> **Flow 1 rules (SPEC_1 Stage 8 ArchUnit) remain in force.** Rules 1, 2, 5, 6, 10 are already tested in `discovery-catalog/arch/`. The tests below are additive — new rules and new modules.\n\n---\n\n#### `SchedulingArchTest` — `scheduling/src/test/java/.../scheduling/arch/`\n\n```java\n// Hard Rule #1 — No cross-module @Service / @Entity / @Repository imports\n@Test\nvoid should_not_import_discovery_catalog_service_or_entity_or_repository()\n// scheduling must not import from com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain\n// scheduling must not import from com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository\n// scheduling must not import from com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service\n\n// Hard Rule #2 — EB calls only via shared/ ACL facades\n@Test\nvoid should_not_call_EB_http_client_directly()\n// No class in scheduling may import an HTTP client targeting Eventbrite\n// Only shared/eventbrite/service/ facades may be imported\n\n// Hard Rule #4 — Spring Events carry no @Entity objects\n@Test\nvoid should_not_include_entity_types_in_spring_event_payloads()\n// SlotDraftCreatedEvent, ShowSlotActivatedEvent, ShowSlotCancelledEvent, SlotSyncFailedEvent\n// must not have fields of type annotated with @Entity\n\n// Hard Rule #5 — No @ControllerAdvice in scheduling\n@Test\nvoid should_not_declare_ControllerAdvice_in_scheduling_module()\n\n// Hard Rule #6 — No field mapping in services or controllers\n@Test\nvoid should_not_map_fields_in_service_or_controller_classes()\n// Field mapping must only occur in classes under mapper/ package\n\n// Hard Rule #10 — Dependency direction: scheduling must not import from downstream modules\n@Test\nvoid should_not_depend_on_booking_inventory_or_payments_ticketing_or_downstream_modules()\n```\n\n---\n\n#### `BookingInventoryArchTest` (additions) — `booking-inventory/src/test/java/.../bookinginventory/arch/`\n\n```java\n// Hard Rule #1 — No cross-module imports from scheduling domain/repo/service\n@Test\nvoid should_not_import_scheduling_entity_or_repository_or_service()\n// booking-inventory may listen to scheduling's Spring Events (primitives/IDs only)\n// but must NOT import ShowSlot.java, ShowSlotRepository.java, or ShowSlotService.java\n\n// Hard Rule #4 — Spring Events in booking-inventory carry no @Entity\n@Test\nvoid should_not_include_entity_types_in_TicketSyncCompletedEvent_or_TicketSyncFailedEvent()\n\n// Hard Rule #2 — EB calls only via shared/ ACL facades\n@Test\nvoid should_only_call_EbTicketService_and_EbCapacityService_from_shared_facades()\n```\n\n---\n\n#### `DiscoveryCatalogArchTest` (additions) — `discovery-catalog/src/test/java/.../discoverycatalog/arch/`\n\n> Additive to Flow 1 arch tests already defined in SPEC_1 Stage 8.\n\n```java\n// New listener classes must not import scheduling @Entity or @Repository\n@Test\nvoid should_not_import_scheduling_entity_in_SlotActivatedListener_or_SlotCancelledListener()\n// SlotActivatedListener and SlotCancelledListener receive Spring Events with primitive fields only\n// They must not reference ShowSlot.java or any scheduling @Entity\n\n// VenueService must always invalidate cache via EventCatalogSnapshotCache — no direct Redis calls\n@Test\nvoid should_only_access_Redis_through_EventCatalogSnapshotCache_in_VenueService()\n```\n\n---\n\n#### `SharedArchTest` (additions) — `shared/src/test/java/.../shared/arch/`\n\n> Additive to any existing shared arch tests.\n\n```java\n// Hard Rule #8 — shared/ has no dependency on any module\n@Test\nvoid should_not_import_any_module_package_from_shared()\n// shared/ (including EbTokenStore, OrganizationAuth, all facades)\n// must not import com.eventplatform.scheduling.*\n// must not import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.*\n// must not import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.*\n// etc.\n```\n\n---\n\n### Mapper Tests (`mapper/`)\n\nPlain JUnit 5 — no Spring, no mocks.\n\n#### `ShowSlotMapperTest` — `scheduling`\n\n```\nshould_map_ShowSlot_to_ShowSlotResponse_with_all_fields_including_syncAttemptCount\nshould_map_status_enum_correctly_for_all_four_ShowSlotStatus_values\nshould_map_null_ebEventId_to_null_in_response\nshould_map_ShowSlotOccurrence_to_ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse_with_correct_fields\nshould_not_expose_raw_token_fields_or_auth_fields_in_ShowSlotResponse\n```\n\n#### `VenueMapperTest` (additions) — `discovery-catalog`\n\n```\nshould_map_new_capacity_seatingMode_syncStatus_fields_to_VenueResponse\nshould_map_null_ebVenueId_to_null_in_response\nshould_map_DRIFT_FLAGGED_syncStatus_correctly\n```\n\n---\n\n### Test Coverage Targets\n\n| Module | Domain | Service | API | Arch |\n|---|---|---|---|---|\n| `scheduling` | ≥ 90% | ≥ 85% | ≥ 80% | 100% (build breaks) |\n| `discovery-catalog` (additions) | ≥ 90% | ≥ 85% | ≥ 80% | 100% (build breaks) |\n| `booking-inventory` (additions) | ≥ 85% | ≥ 85% | n/a (no new controller) | 100% (build breaks) |\n| `shared/` (additions) | n/a | ≥ 85% | n/a | 100% (build breaks) |\n| `admin/` | n/a | ≥ 80% | ≥ 80% | inherit from global arch |\n\n---\n\n### Key Test Invariants — Never Violate\n\n1. **No event published when use case fails** — every test that verifies an exception also verifies `verify(eventPublisher, never()).publishEvent(any())`.\n2. **No EB call made when internal validation fails** — conflict detection, state machine violation, and missing pricing tiers all throw before any `EbTokenStore.getValidToken()` call. Verify via `verify(ebTokenStore, never()).getValidToken(any())`.\n3. **No entity object in Spring Event payloads** — every event payload test uses `assertThat(event).isNotInstanceOf(...)` for each `@Entity` class in the payload path.\n4. **Slot stays PENDING_SYNC on any EB failure** — all D.1–D.6 failure tests verify `slot.getStatus() == PENDING_SYNC` after the failure, never `ACTIVE` or `DRAFT`.\n5. **Internal cancellation always commits** — cancellation tests verify the slot is `CANCELLED` in DB even when `EbIntegrationException` is thrown from `cancelEvent()`.\n6. **Cache invalidated on venue update regardless of EB outcome** — `VenueServiceTest` verifies `snapshotCache.invalidate(orgId, cityId)` is called in both EB success and EB failure paths of `updateVenue()`.\n\n"
  }
}
```

    "text": "**Flagging domain rule gaps in test plan**\n\nThe domain currently lacks enforcement of key business rules, so the plan should note that tests will need either added guards in domain code or use of the state machine service to align with the spec; this gap means planned domain tests may fail without production code adjustments."
  }
}

com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.CreateShowSlotRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.UpdateShowSlotRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.exception.SchedulingNotFoundException;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.mapper.ShowSlotMapper;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.client.CatalogVenueResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.client.VenueCatalogClient;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotStateMachineService;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.ShowSlotActivatedEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.ShowSlotCancelledEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.SlotDraftCreatedEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.SlotSyncFailedEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncCompletedEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncFailedEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.IntegrationException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbEventCreateRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbEventDto;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbEventUpdateRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbScheduleResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbCapacityService;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbEventSyncService;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbScheduleService;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.PageRequest;\nimport org.springframework.data.jpa.domain.Specification;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n@Service\npublic class ShowSlotService {\n\n    private final ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\n    private final ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository occurrenceRepository;\n    private final ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper;\n    private final VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient;\n    private final ConflictDetectionService conflictDetectionService;\n    private final EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService;\n    private final EbScheduleService ebScheduleService;\n    private final EbCapacityService ebCapacityService;\n    private final ShowSlotStateMachineService stateMachineService;\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\n\n    public ShowSlotService(\n        ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository,\n        ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository occurrenceRepository,\n        ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper,\n        VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient,\n        ConflictDetectionService conflictDetectionService,\n        EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService,\n        EbScheduleService ebScheduleService,\n        EbCapacityService ebCapacityService,\n        ShowSlotStateMachineService stateMachineService,\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher\n    ) {\n        this.showSlotRepository = showSlotRepository;\n        this.occurrenceRepository = occurrenceRepository;\n        this.showSlotMapper = showSlotMapper;\n        this.venueCatalogClient = venueCatalogClient;\n        this.conflictDetectionService = conflictDetectionService;\n        this.ebEventSyncService = ebEventSyncService;\n        this.ebScheduleService = ebScheduleService;\n        this.ebCapacityService = ebCapacityService;\n        this.stateMachineService = stateMachineService;\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlot createSlot(Long organizationId, CreateShowSlotRequest request) {\n        CatalogVenueResponse venue = venueCatalogClient.getVenue(request.venueId());\n        conflictDetectionService.validateOrThrow(organizationId, venue, request.startTime(), request.endTime());\n\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotMapper.toEntity(organizationId, request.venueId(), venue.cityId(), request);\n        List<ShowSlotPricingTier> tiers = showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers());\n        tiers.forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\n\n        return showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlot submitSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.SUBMIT);\n\n        try {\n            EbEventDto created = ebEventSyncService.createDraft(organizationId, toEbCreateRequest(slot));\n            slot.setEbEventId(created.id());\n            slot.markAttempted();\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotDraftCreatedEvent(\n                slot.getId(),\n                slot.getEbEventId(),\n                slot.getPricingTiers().stream().map(ShowSlotPricingTier::getId).toList(),\n                slot.getSeatingMode(),\n                organizationId,\n                slot.getSourceSeatMapId()\n            ));\n            return slot;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\n            throw new IntegrationException(\"Failed to create Eventbrite draft\", \"EB_DRAFT_FAILED\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onTicketSyncComplete(TicketSyncCompletedEvent event) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(event.slotId());\n        Long organizationId = slot.getOrganizationId();\n        try {\n            ebEventSyncService.publishEvent(organizationId, event.ebEventId());\n            stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.EB_PUBLISHED);\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ShowSlotActivatedEvent(\n                slot.getId(),\n                slot.getEbEventId(),\n                organizationId,\n                slot.getVenueId(),\n                slot.getCityId()\n            ));\n            if (slot.isRecurring() && slot.getRecurrenceRule() != null) {\n                EbScheduleResponse scheduleResponse = ebScheduleService.createSchedule(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), slot.getRecurrenceRule());\n                slot.setEbSeriesId(scheduleResponse.seriesId());\n                if (scheduleResponse.occurrences() != null) {\n                    int index = 1;\n                    for (var occurrence : scheduleResponse.occurrences()) {\n                        ShowSlotOccurrence child = new ShowSlotOccurrence(index++, occurrence.startTime(), occurrence.endTime());\n                        child.setEbEventId(occurrence.eventId());\n                        slot.addOccurrence(child);\n                    }\n                }\n                showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            }\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\n            throw ex;\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onTicketSyncFailed(TicketSyncFailedEvent event) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(event.slotId());\n        slot.recordSyncFailure(event.reason());\n        showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), event.reason()));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlot updateSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId, UpdateShowSlotRequest request) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Cannot update a cancelled slot\", \"SLOT_CANCELLED\");\n        }\n\n        Integer previousCapacity = slot.getCapacity();\n        slot.updateDetails(request.title(), request.description(), request.startTime(), request.endTime(), request.capacity());\n\n        if (request.pricingTiers() != null) {\n            slot.clearPricingTiers();\n            showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers()).forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\n        }\n\n        slot = showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE) {\n            try {\n                ebEventSyncService.updateEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), toEbUpdateRequest(slot));\n                if (request.capacity() != null && !request.capacity().equals(previousCapacity)) {\n                    ebCapacityService.updateCapacityTier(slot.getEbEventId(), request.capacity());\n                }\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n                slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n                showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n                throw ex;\n            }\n        }\n\n        return slot;\n    }\n"
  }
}

org.springframework.data.jpa.domain.Specification;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n@Service\npublic class ShowSlotService {\n\n    private final ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\n    private final ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository occurrenceRepository;\n    private final ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper;\n    private final VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient;\n    private final ConflictDetectionService conflictDetectionService;\n    private final EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService;\n    private final EbScheduleService ebScheduleService;\n    private final EbCapacityService ebCapacityService;\n    private final ShowSlotStateMachineService stateMachineService;\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\n\n    public ShowSlotService(\n        ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository,\n        ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository occurrenceRepository,\n        ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper,\n        VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient,\n        ConflictDetectionService conflictDetectionService,\n        EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService,\n        EbScheduleService ebScheduleService,\n        EbCapacityService ebCapacityService,\n        ShowSlotStateMachineService stateMachineService,\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher\n    ) {\n        this.showSlotRepository = showSlotRepository;\n        this.occurrenceRepository = occurrenceRepository;\n        this.showSlotMapper = showSlotMapper;\n        this.venueCatalogClient = venueCatalogClient;\n        this.conflictDetectionService = conflictDetectionService;\n        this.ebEventSyncService = ebEventSyncService;\n        this.ebScheduleService = ebScheduleService;\n        this.ebCapacityService = ebCapacityService;\n        this.stateMachineService = stateMachineService;\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlot createSlot(Long organizationId, CreateShowSlotRequest request) {\n        CatalogVenueResponse venue = venueCatalogClient.getVenue(request.venueId());\n        conflictDetectionService.validateOrThrow(organizationId, venue, request.startTime(), request.endTime());\n\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotMapper.toEntity(organizationId, request.venueId(), venue.cityId(), request);\n        List<ShowSlotPricingTier> tiers = showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers());\n        tiers.forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\n\n        return showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlot submitSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.SUBMIT);\n\n        try {\n            EbEventDto created = ebEventSyncService.createDraft(organizationId, toEbCreateRequest(slot));\n            slot.setEbEventId(created.id());\n            slot.markAttempted();\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotDraftCreatedEvent(\n                slot.getId(),\n                slot.getEbEventId(),\n                slot.getPricingTiers().stream().map(ShowSlotPricingTier::getId).toList(),\n                slot.getSeatingMode(),\n                organizationId,\n                slot.getSourceSeatMapId()\n            ));\n            return slot;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\n            throw new IntegrationException(\"Failed to create Eventbrite draft\", \"EB_DRAFT_FAILED\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onTicketSyncComplete(TicketSyncCompletedEvent event) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(event.slotId());\n        Long organizationId = slot.getOrganizationId();\n        try {\n            ebEventSyncService.publishEvent(organizationId, event.ebEventId());\n            stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.EB_PUBLISHED);\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ShowSlotActivatedEvent(\n                slot.getId(),\n                slot.getEbEventId(),\n                organizationId,\n                slot.getVenueId(),\n                slot.getCityId()\n            ));\n            if (slot.isRecurring() && slot.getRecurrenceRule() != null) {\n                EbScheduleResponse scheduleResponse = ebScheduleService.createSchedule(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), slot.getRecurrenceRule());\n                slot.setEbSeriesId(scheduleResponse.seriesId());\n                if (scheduleResponse.occurrences() != null) {\n                    int index = 1;\n                    for (var occurrence : scheduleResponse.occurrences()) {\n                        ShowSlotOccurrence child = new ShowSlotOccurrence(index++, occurrence.startTime(), occurrence.endTime());\n                        child.setEbEventId(occurrence.eventId());\n                        slot.addOccurrence(child);\n                    }\n                }\n                showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            }\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), ex.getMessage()));\n            throw ex;\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onTicketSyncFailed(TicketSyncFailedEvent event) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(event.slotId());\n        slot.recordSyncFailure(event.reason());\n        showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), event.reason()));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlot updateSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId, UpdateShowSlotRequest request) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Cannot update a cancelled slot\", \"SLOT_CANCELLED\");\n        }\n\n        Integer previousCapacity = slot.getCapacity();\n        slot.updateDetails(request.title(), request.description(), request.startTime(), request.endTime(), request.capacity());\n\n        if (request.pricingTiers() != null) {\n            slot.clearPricingTiers();\n            showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers()).forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\n        }\n\n        slot = showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE) {\n            try {\n                ebEventSyncService.updateEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), toEbUpdateRequest(slot));\n                if (request.capacity() != null && !request.capacity().equals(previousCapacity)) {\n                    ebCapacityService.updateCapacityTier(slot.getEbEventId(), request.capacity());\n                }\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n                slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n                showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n                throw ex;\n            }\n        }\n\n        return slot;\n    }\n"

{

    "output": "Chunk ID: 9cb220\nWall time: 0.0518 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1097\nOutput:\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public boolean cancelSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot already cancelled\", \"SLOT_ALREADY_CANCELLED\");\n        }\n        stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.CANCEL);\n        showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n\n        boolean ebCancelled = true;\n        try {\n            if (slot.getEbEventId() != null) {\n                ebEventSyncService.cancelEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId());\n            }\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            ebCancelled = false;\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n        }\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ShowSlotCancelledEvent(slot.getId(), slot.getEbEventId(), organizationId, slot.getVenueId(), slot.getCityId()));\n        return ebCancelled;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void retrySync(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() != ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot is not pending sync\", \"SLOT_NOT_PENDING\");\n        }\n        if (slot.getEbEventId() == null) {\n            submitSlot(organizationId, slotId);\n            return;\n        }\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotDraftCreatedEvent(\n            slot.getId(),\n            slot.getEbEventId(),\n            slot.getPricingTiers().stream().map(ShowSlotPricingTier::getId).toList(),\n            slot.getSeatingMode(),\n            organizationId,\n            slot.getSourceSeatMapId()\n        ));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public ShowSlot getSlot(Long slotId) {\n        return getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public List<ShowSlotOccurrence> listOccurrences(Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (!slot.isRecurring()) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot is not recurring\", \"SLOT_NOT_RECURRING\");\n        }\n        return occurrenceRepository.findByParentSlotIdOrderByOccurrenceIndexAsc(slotId);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public Page<ShowSlot> listSlots(Long organizationId, ShowSlotStatus status, Long venueId, Long cityId,\n                                    java.time.ZonedDateTime startAfter, int page, int size) {\n        Specification<ShowSlot> spec = (root, query, cb) -> cb.equal(root.get(\"organizationId\"), organizationId);\n        if (status != null) {\n            spec = spec.and((root, query, cb) -> cb.equal(root.get(\"status\"), status));\n        }\n        if (venueId != null) {\n            spec = spec.and((root, query, cb) -> cb.equal(root.get(\"venueId\"), venueId));\n        }\n        if (cityId != null) {\n            spec = spec.and((root, query, cb) -> cb.equal(root.get(\"cityId\"), cityId));\n        }\n        if (startAfter != null) {\n            spec = spec.and((root, query, cb) -> cb.greaterThan(root.get(\"startTime\"), startAfter));\n        }\n        return showSlotRepository.findAll(spec, PageRequest.of(page, size));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public Page<ShowSlot> listMismatches(Long organizationId, int page, int size) {\n        return showSlotRepository.findByOrganizationIdAndStatusAndLastSyncErrorIsNotNull(\n            organizationId,\n            ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE,\n            PageRequest.of(page, size)\n        );\n    }\n\n    private ShowSlot getSlotOrThrow(Long slotId) {\n        return showSlotRepository.findById(slotId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new SchedulingNotFoundException(\"Slot not found: \" + slotId, \"SLOT_NOT_FOUND\"));\n    }\n\n    private EbEventCreateRequest toEbCreateRequest(ShowSlot slot) {\n        return new EbEventCreateRequest(\n            slot.getTitle(),\n            slot.getDescription(),\n            slot.getVenueId().toString(),\n            slot.getStartTime(),\n            slot.getEndTime(),\n            slot.getCapacity(),\n            slot.isRecurring(),\n            null\n        );\n    }\n\n    private EbEventUpdateRequest toEbUpdateRequest(ShowSlot slot) {\n        return new EbEventUpdateRequest(\n            slot.getTitle(),\n            slot.getDescription(),\n            slot.getStartTime(),\n            slot.getEndTime()\n        );\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

## Entry 150
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:53:02.773Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:53:02.773Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_2znSfDgKZUGrrIA9o7YFVwwv",
    "output": "Chunk ID: fa4ed7\nWall time: 0.0509 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1139\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.value.ConflictAlternativeResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.value.TimeWindowOption;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.value.VenueOption;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.exception.SlotConflictException;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.client.CatalogVenueResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.client.VenueCatalogClient;\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\nimport java.util.Comparator;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\n\n@Service\npublic class ConflictDetectionService {\n\n    private final ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\n    private final VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient;\n    private final Duration gapPolicy;\n\n    public ConflictDetectionService(\n        ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository,\n        VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient,\n        @Value(\"${scheduling.turnaround-gap-minutes:60}\") long gapMinutes\n    ) {\n        this.showSlotRepository = showSlotRepository;\n        this.venueCatalogClient = venueCatalogClient;\n        this.gapPolicy = Duration.ofMinutes(gapMinutes);\n    }\n\n    public void validateOrThrow(Long organizationId, CatalogVenueResponse venue, ZonedDateTime startTime, ZonedDateTime endTime) {\n        List<ShowSlot> overlaps = showSlotRepository.findConflicts(venue.id(), startTime, endTime);\n        boolean gapViolation = hasGapViolation(venue.id(), startTime, endTime);\n\n        if (!overlaps.isEmpty() || gapViolation) {\n            ConflictAlternativeResponse alternatives = buildAlternatives(organizationId, venue, startTime, endTime);\n            throw new SlotConflictException(\"Venue has an overlapping slot or turnaround gap violation\", alternatives);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private boolean hasGapViolation(Long venueId, ZonedDateTime startTime, ZonedDateTime endTime) {\n        return showSlotRepository.findFirstByVenueIdAndEndTimeLessThanEqualOrderByEndTimeDesc(venueId, startTime)\n            .map(slot -> Duration.between(slot.getEndTime(), startTime).compareTo(gapPolicy) < 0)\n            .orElse(false)\n            || showSlotRepository.findFirstByVenueIdAndStartTimeGreaterThanEqualOrderByStartTimeAsc(venueId, endTime)\n                .map(slot -> Duration.between(endTime, slot.getStartTime()).compareTo(gapPolicy) < 0)\n                .orElse(false);\n    }\n\n    private ConflictAlternativeResponse buildAlternatives(\n        Long organizationId,\n        CatalogVenueResponse venue,\n        ZonedDateTime startTime,\n        ZonedDateTime endTime\n    ) {\n        Duration duration = Duration.between(startTime, endTime);\n\n        TimeWindowOption sameVenue = showSlotRepository\n            .findFirstByVenueIdAndEndTimeLessThanEqualOrderByEndTimeDesc(venue.id(), startTime)\n            .map(prev -> new TimeWindowOption(prev.getEndTime().plus(gapPolicy), prev.getEndTime().plus(gapPolicy).plus(duration)))\n            .orElse(new TimeWindowOption(startTime.plusDays(1), endTime.plusDays(1)));\n\n        TimeWindowOption adjusted = showSlotRepository\n            .findFirstByVenueIdAndStartTimeGreaterThanEqualOrderByStartTimeAsc(venue.id(), endTime)\n            .map(next -> {\n                ZonedDateTime newEnd = next.getStartTime().minus(gapPolicy);\n                ZonedDateTime newStart = newEnd.minus(duration);\n                return new TimeWindowOption(newStart, newEnd);\n            })\n            .orElse(sameVenue);\n\n        int venueCapacity = venue.capacity() == null ? 0 : venue.capacity();\n        List<VenueOption> nearby = venueCatalogClient.listVenuesByCity(venue.cityId(), organizationId).stream()\n            .filter(candidate -> !candidate.id().equals(venue.id()))\n            .sorted(Comparator.comparingInt(candidate -> {\n                int candidateCapacity = candidate.capacity() == null ? 0 : candidate.capacity();\n                return Math.abs(candidateCapacity - venueCapacity);\n            }))\n            .limit(3)\n            .map(candidate -> new VenueOption(candidate.id(), candidate.name(), String.valueOf(venue.cityId()),\n                candidate.capacity() == null ? 0 : candidate.capacity()))\n            .toList();\n\n        return new ConflictAlternativeResponse(\n            List.of(sameVenue),\n            nearby,\n            List.of(adjusted)\n        );\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

ShowSlotResponse createSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @Valid @RequestBody CreateShowSlotRequest request\n    ) {\n        ShowSlot slot = \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotSubmitResponse submitSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId\n    ) {\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.submitSlot(organizationId, slotId);\n        return new ShowSlotSubmitResponse(slot.getId(), slot.getStatus(), slot.getEbEventId(), slot.getSyncAttemptCount(), \"EB sync initiated\");\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/{id}\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotResponse getSlot(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId) {\n        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(showSlotService.getSlot(slotId));\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public PageResponse<ShowSlotResponse> listSlots(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"status\", required = false) ShowSlotStatus status,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"venueId\", required = false) Long venueId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"cityId\", required = false) Long cityId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"startAfter\", required = false) @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) ZonedDateTime startAfter,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"page\", defaultValue = \"0\") int page,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size\n    ) {\n        Page<ShowSlot> slots = showSlotService.listSlots(organizationId, status, venueId, cityId, startAfter, page, size);\n        List<ShowSlotResponse> responses = slots.map(showSlotMapper::toResponse).getContent();\n        return new PageResponse<>(responses, slots.getTotalElements(), page, size);\n    }\n\n    @PutMapping(\"/{id}\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotResponse updateSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId,\n        @Valid @RequestBody UpdateShowSlotRequest request\n    ) {\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.updateSlot(organizationId, slotId, request);\n        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(slot);\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/{id}/cancel\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotCancelResponse cancelSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId\n    ) {\n        boolean ebCancelled = showSlotService.cancelSlot(organizationId, slotId);\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.getSlot(slotId);\n        return new ShowSlotCancelResponse(slot.getId(), slot.getStatus(), ebCancelled, \"Slot cancelled\");\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/{id}/retry-sync\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotRetryResponse retrySync(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId\n    ) {\n        showSlotService.retrySync(organizationId, slotId);\n        return new ShowSlotRetryResponse(ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC, \"Retry initiated\");\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/{id}/occurrences\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse listOccurrences(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId) {\n        List<ShowSlotOccurrence> occurrences = showSlotService.listOccurrences(slotId);\n        List<ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse> responseList = occurrences.stream()\n            .map(showSlotMapper::toOccurrenceResponse)\n            .toList();\n        return new ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse(slotId, responseList);\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/mismatches\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public PageResponse<ShowSlotResponse> listMismatches(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"page\", defaultValue = \"0\") int page,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size\n    ) {\n        Page<ShowSlot> slots = showSlotService.listMismatches(organizationId, page, size);\n        List<ShowSlotResponse> responses = slots.map(showSlotMapper::toResponse).getContent();\n        return new PageResponse<>(responses, slots.getTotalElements(), page, size);\n    }\n}\n"

## Entry 160

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:53:12.316Z",
  "type": "response_item",

    "output": "Chunk ID: 005fe9\nWall time: 0.0508 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1839\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.request.CreateVenueRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.request.UpdateVenueRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.Venue;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.exception.CatalogNotFoundException;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.exception.CatalogSyncException;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.exception.InvalidCatalogSearchException;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.mapper.VenueMapper;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.CityRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.VenueRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.cache.EventCatalogSnapshotCache;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbVenueCreateRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbVenueResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbVenueService;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.PageRequest;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n@Service\npublic class VenueService {\n\n    private final VenueRepository venueRepository;\n    private final CityRepository cityRepository;\n    private final VenueMapper venueMapper;\n    private final EbVenueService ebVenueService;\n    private final EventCatalogSnapshotCache snapshotCache;\n\n    public VenueService(\n        VenueRepository venueRepository,\n        CityRepository cityRepository,\n        VenueMapper venueMapper,\n        EbVenueService ebVenueService,\n        EventCatalogSnapshotCache snapshotCache\n    ) {\n        this.venueRepository = venueRepository;\n        this.cityRepository = cityRepository;\n        this.venueMapper = venueMapper;\n        this.ebVenueService = ebVenueService;\n        this.snapshotCache = snapshotCache;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public Venue createVenue(Long organizationId, CreateVenueRequest request) {\n        if (!cityRepository.existsById(request.cityId())) {\n            throw new CatalogNotFoundException(\"City not found: \" + request.cityId());\n        }\n        boolean nameExists = venueRepository\n            .findByOrganizationIdAndCityId(organizationId, request.cityId(), PageRequest.of(0, 1))\n            .stream()\n            .anyMatch(venue -> venue.getName().equalsIgnoreCase(request.name()));\n        if (nameExists) {\n            throw new InvalidCatalogSearchException(\"Venue already exists in city: \" + request.name());\n        }\n\n        Venue venue = venueMapper.toEntity(organizationId, request);\n        venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\n\n        try {\n            EbVenueResponse response = ebVenueService.createVenue(organizationId, toEbRequest(request));\n            venue.markSynced(response.id());\n            return venueRepository.save(venue);\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\n            venueRepository.save(venue);\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\n            venueRepository.save(venue);\n            throw new CatalogSyncException(\"Failed to sync venue with Eventbrite\", ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public Venue updateVenue(Long organizationId, Long venueId, UpdateVenueRequest request) {\n        Venue venue = venueRepository.findById(venueId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CatalogNotFoundException(\"Venue not found: \" + venueId));\n\n        String formattedAddress = venueMapper.formatAddress(request.addressLine1(), request.addressLine2(), request.country());\n        venue.updateDetails(\n            request.name(),\n            formattedAddress,\n            request.zipCode(),\n            request.latitude(),\n            request.longitude(),\n            request.capacity(),\n            request.seatingMode()\n        );\n        venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\n\n        try {\n            if (venue.getEventbriteVenueId() != null) {\n                ebVenueService.updateVenue(organizationId, venue.getEventbriteVenueId(), toEbRequest(request));\n                venue.markSynced(venue.getEventbriteVenueId());\n            } else {\n                EbVenueResponse response = ebVenueService.createVenue(organizationId, toEbRequest(request));\n                venue.markSynced(response.id());\n            }\n            venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\n            venueRepository.save(venue);\n            throw ex;\n        } finally {\n            snapshotCache.invalidate(organizationId, venue.getCityId());\n        }\n\n        return venue;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public Venue syncVenue(Long organizationId, Long venueId) {\n        Venue venue = venueRepository.findById(venueId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CatalogNotFoundException(\"Venue not found: \" + venueId));\n\n        try {\n            EbVenueResponse response;\n            if (venue.getEventbriteVenueId() == null) {\n                response = ebVenueService.createVenue(organizationId, toEbRequest(venue));\n                venue.markSynced(response.id());\n            } else {\n                response = ebVenueService.updateVenue(organizationId, venue.getEventbriteVenueId(), toEbRequest(venue));\n                venue.markSynced(Optional.ofNullable(response.id()).orElse(venue.getEventbriteVenueId()));\n            }\n            venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\n            return venue;\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\n            venueRepository.save(venue);\n            throw ex;\n        } finally {\n            snapshotCache.invalidate(organizationId, venue.getCityId());\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public Page<Venue> listFlaggedVenues(int page, int size) {\n        return venueRepository.findBySyncStatus(VenueSyncStatus.DRIFT_FLAGGED, PageRequest.of(page, size));\n    }\n\n    private EbVenueCreateRequest toEbRequest(CreateVenueRequest request) {\n        return new EbVenueCreateRequest(\n            request.name(),\n            request.addressLine1(),\n            request.addressLine2(),\n            null,\n            request.country(),\n            request.zipCode(),\n            request.latitude(),\n            request.longitude()\n        );\n    }\n\n    private EbVenueCreateRequest toEbRequest(UpdateVenueRequest request) {\n        return new EbVenueCreateRequest(\n            request.name(),\n            request.addressLine1(),\n            request.addressLine2(),\n            null,\n            request.country(),\n            request.zipCode(),\n            request.latitude(),\n            request.longitude()\n        );\n    }\n\n    private EbVenueCreateRequest toEbRequest(Venue venue) {\n        return new EbVenueCreateRequest(\n            venue.getName(),\n            venue.getAddress(),\n            null,\n            null,\n            null,\n            venue.getZipCode(),\n            venue.getLatitude(),\n            venue.getLongitude()\n        );\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.SlotDraftCreatedEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncCompletedEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncFailedEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbInventoryTierRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbTicketClassRequest;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTicketService;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\n\n@Service\npublic class SlotTicketSyncService {\n\n    private final EbTicketService ebTicketService;\n    private final SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient;\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\n\n    public SlotTicketSyncService(\n        EbTicketService ebTicketService,\n        SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient,\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher\n    ) {\n        this.ebTicketService = ebTicketService;\n        this.schedulingSlotClient = schedulingSlotClient;\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\n    }\n\n    public void syncTickets(SlotDraftCreatedEvent event) {\n        try {\n            SchedulingSlotResponse slot = schedulingSlotClient.getSlot(event.slotId());\n            List<EbTicketClassRequest> ticketClasses = slot.pricingTiers().stream()\n                .map(tier -> new EbTicketClassRequest(\n                    tier.name(),\n                    new Money(tier.priceAmount(), tier.currency()),\n                    tier.quota(),\n                    tier.tierType()\n                ))\n                .toList();\n\n            ebTicketService.createTicketClasses(event.ebEventId(), ticketClasses);\n\n            List<EbInventoryTierRequest> inventoryTiers = slot.pricingTiers().stream()\n                .map(tier -> new EbInventoryTierRequest(tier.name(), tier.quota()))\n                .toList();\n            ebTicketService.createInventoryTiers(event.ebEventId(), inventoryTiers);\n\n            if (slot.seatingMode() == SeatingMode.RESERVED && slot.sourceSeatMapId() != null) {\n                ebTicketService.copySeatMap(event.ebEventId(), slot.sourceSeatMapId());\n            }\n\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new TicketSyncCompletedEvent(event.slotId(), event.ebEventId()));\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new TicketSyncFailedEvent(event.slotId(), event.ebEventId(), ex.getMessage()));\n            throw ex;\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            eventPublisher.publishEvent(new TicketSyncFailedEvent(event.slotId(), event.ebEventId(), ex.getMessage()));\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

## Entry 170
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:53:26.703Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:53:26.703Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_E6e5WHR4QafHqkikK8xFBDlO",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 8c6a0b\nWall time: 0.0508 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 573\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.admin.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrganizationAuth;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTokenStore;\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.UUID;\nimport java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentHashMap;\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\n\n@Service\npublic class OrgOAuthService {\n\n    private static final Duration STATE_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(10);\n\n    private final EbTokenStore tokenStore;\n    private final String clientId;\n    private final String redirectUri;\n    private final Map<String, StateEntry> stateStore = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();\n\n    public OrgOAuthService(\n        EbTokenStore tokenStore,\n        @Value(\"${eventbrite.oauth.client-id:}\") String clientId,\n        @Value(\"${eventbrite.oauth.redirect-uri:}\") String redirectUri\n    ) {\n        this.tokenStore = tokenStore;\n        this.clientId = clientId;\n        this.redirectUri = redirectUri;\n    }\n\n    public String buildAuthorizationUrl(Long orgId) {\n        String state = UUID.randomUUID().toString();\n        stateStore.put(state, new StateEntry(orgId, Instant.now()));\n        return \"https://www.eventbrite.com/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=%s&redirect_uri=%s&state=%s\"\n            .formatted(clientId, redirectUri, state);\n    }\n\n    public OrganizationAuth handleCallback(Long orgId, String code, String state) {\n        validateState(orgId, state);\n        return tokenStore.connectOrganization(orgId, code, redirectUri);\n    }\n\n    public OrganizationAuth getStatus(Long orgId) {\n        return tokenStore.getAuth(orgId);\n    }\n\n    public void disconnect(Long orgId) {\n        tokenStore.disconnect(orgId);\n    }\n\n    private void validateState(Long orgId, String state) {\n        StateEntry entry = stateStore.remove(state);\n        if (entry == null || !entry.orgId().equals(orgId)) {\n            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Invalid OAuth state\");\n        }\n        if (entry.createdAt().isBefore(Instant.now().minus(STATE_TTL))) {\n            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"OAuth state org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\n\n@Service\npublic class OrgOAuthService {\n\n    private static final Duration STATE_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(10);\n\n    private final EbTokenStore tokenStore;\n    private final String clientId;\n    private final String redirectUri;\n    private final Map<String, StateEntry> stateStore = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();\n\n    public {\n        this.tokenStore = tokenStore;\n        this.clientId = clientId;\n        this.redirectUri = redirectUri;\n    }\n\n    public String buildAuthorizationUrl(Long orgId) {\n        String state = UUID.randomUUID().toString();\n        stateStore.put(state, new StateEntry(orgId, Instant.now()));\n        return validateState(Long orgId, String state) {\n        StateEntry entry = stateStore.remove(state);\n        if (entry == null || !entry.orgId().equals(orgId)) {\n            throw new ```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:53:29.636Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_jeWVronKodBiLDp5mjWaZmPr",
    "output": "Chunk ID: df8128\nWall time: 0.0512 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 1093\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrganizationAuth;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrgAuthStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbOAuthTokenResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbAuthException;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.repository.OrganizationAuthRepository;\nimport java.time.Duration;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n@Service\npublic class EbTokenStore {\n\n    private static final Duration REFRESH_WINDOW = Duration.ofMinutes(5);\n\n    private final OrganizationAuthRepository repository;\n    private final EbOAuthClient oauthClient;\n    private final TokenCipher tokenCipher;\n\n    public EbTokenStore(\n        OrganizationAuthRepository repository,\n        EbOAuthClient oauthClient,\n        TokenCipher tokenCipher\n    ) {\n        this.repository = repository;\n        this.oauthClient = oauthClient;\n        this.tokenCipher = tokenCipher;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public OrganizationAuth connectOrganization(Long orgId, String code, String redirectUri) {\n        EbOAuthTokenResponse tokenResponse = oauthClient.exchangeCodeForToken(code, redirectUri);\n        if (tokenResponse == null || tokenResponse.accessToken() == null) {\n            throw new EbAuthException(\"Eventbrite OAuth token exchange failed\");\n        }\n        OrganizationAuth auth = repository.findByOrganizationId(orgId)\n            .orElseGet(() -> new OrganizationAuth(orgId, tokenResponse.ebOrganizationId(), \"\"));\n\n        auth.markConnected(\n            tokenCipher.encrypt(tokenResponse.accessToken()),\n            tokenCipher.encrypt(tokenResponse.refreshToken()),\n            tokenResponse.expiresAt()\n        );\n        return repository.save(auth);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public OrganizationAuth getAuth(Long orgId) {\n        return repository.findByOrganizationId(orgId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new EbAuthException(\"No Eventbrite auth configured for org: \" + orgId));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void disconnect(Long orgId) {\n        OrganizationAuth auth = repository.findByOrganizationId(orgId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new EbAuthException(\"No Eventbrite auth configured for org: \" + orgId));\n        auth.markRevoked();\n        repository.save(auth);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public String getAccessToken(Long orgId) {\n        OrganizationAuth auth = repository.findByOrganizationId(orgId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new EbAuthException(\"No Eventbrite auth configured for org: \" + orgId));\n\n        if (auth.getStatus() == OrgAuthStatus.REVOKED) {\n            throw new EbAuthException(\"Eventbrite auth revoked for org: \" + orgId);\n        }\n\n        if (shouldRefresh(auth)) {\n            refreshToken(auth);\n        }\n\n        return tokenCipher.decrypt(auth.getAccessTokenEncrypted());\n    }\n\n    private boolean shouldRefresh(OrganizationAuth auth) {\n        Instant expiresAt = auth.getExpiresAt();\n        if (expiresAt == null) {\n            return false;\n        }\n        return expiresAt.isBefore(Instant.now().plus(REFRESH_WINDOW));\n    }\n\n    private void refreshToken(OrganizationAuth auth) {\n        String refreshToken = tokenCipher.decrypt(auth.getRefreshTokenEncrypted());\n        if (refreshToken == null) {\n            auth.markTokenExpired();\n            repository.save(auth);\n            throw new EbAuthException(\"Eventbrite refresh token missing\");\n        }\n\n        try {\n            EbOAuthTokenResponse refreshed = oauthClient.refreshToken(refreshToken);\n            if (refreshed == null || refreshed.accessToken() == null) {\n                auth.markTokenExpired();\n                repository.save(auth);\n                throw new EbAuthException(\"Eventbrite token refresh failed\");\n            }\n            auth.updateTokens(\n                tokenCipher.encrypt(refreshed.accessToken()),\n                tokenCipher.encrypt(refreshed.refreshToken()),\n                refreshed.expiresAt()\n            );\n            repository.save(auth);\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\n            auth.markTokenExpired();\n            repository.save(auth);\n            throw new EbAuthException(\"Eventbrite token refresh failed\");\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

## Entry 200
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T10:56:07.896Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:56:07.896Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_14QqEs6relni7VnTCzacYIRJ",
    "output": "Chunk ID: cc409a\nWall time: 0.0507 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 296\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.action.SlotStatusUpdateAction;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.guard.SlotTransitionGuard;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\n\n@Service\npublic class ShowSlotStateMachineService {\n\n    private final SlotTransitionGuard guard;\n    private final SlotStatusUpdateAction action;\n\n    public ShowSlotStateMachineService(SlotTransitionGuard guard, SlotStatusUpdateAction action) {\n        this.guard = guard;\n        this.action = action;\n    }\n\n    public void sendEvent(ShowSlot slot, ShowSlotEvent event) {\n        ShowSlotStatus nextStatus = guard.resolveNextStatus(slot.getStatus(), event);\n        if (nextStatus == null) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\n                \"Invalid slot transition: \" + slot.getStatus() + \" -> \" + event,\n                \"INVALID_SLOT_TRANSITION\"\n            );\n        }\n        action.apply(slot, nextStatus);\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
```

    "name": "request_user_input",
    "arguments": "{\"questions\":[{\"header\":\"Spec Clash\",\"id\":\"failure_events\",\"question\":\"Stage 8 says no events on failure, but Stage 6 requires failure events like SlotSyncFailedEvent. Which should tests enforce?\",\"options\":[{\"label\":\"Allow failure events (Recommended)\",\"description\":\"Tests verify no success events on failure, but failure events may be published.\"},{\"label\":\"No events at all\",\"description\":\"Tests enforce no publishEvent calls on any failure.\"},{\"label\":\"I will clarify later\",\"description\":\"Plan will note the conflict and pause tests that depend on it.\"}]}]}",
    "call_id": "call_FiApzK1055aj2X5Qg42HGzqh"
  }
}
```

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T10:57:19.071Z",

  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_mvUVbHDLFpEzXM68IYQl2BI8",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 216dc4\nWall time: 0.0512 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 437\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.controller;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.VenueListResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.VenueResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.VenueCatalogService;\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\n\n@RestController\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/v1/catalog\")\npublic class VenueCatalogController {\n\n    private final VenueCatalogService venueCatalogService;\n    private final Long defaultOrgId;\n\n    public VenueCatalogController(VenueCatalogService venueCatalogService, @Value(\"${app.default-org-id}\") Long defaultOrgId) {\n        this.venueCatalogService = venueCatalogService;\n        this.defaultOrgId = defaultOrgId;\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/venues\")\n    public VenueListResponse listVenues(\n        @RequestParam(name = \"cityId\") Long cityId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"orgId\", required = false) Long organizationId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"page\", defaultValue = \"0\") int page,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size\n    ) {\n        Long resolvedOrgId = organizationId != null ? organizationId : defaultOrgId;\n        return venueCatalogService.listVenues(resolvedOrgId, cityId, page, size);\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/venues/{id}\")\n    public VenueResponse getVenue(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long venueId) {\n        return venueCatalogService.getVenue(venueId);\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

    "output": "Chunk ID: 216dc4\nWall time: 0.0512 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 437\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.controller;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.VenueListResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.response.VenueResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.VenueCatalogService;\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\n\n@RestController\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/v1/catalog\")\npublic class VenueCatalogController {\n\n    private final VenueCatalogService venueCatalogService;\n    private final Long defaultOrgId;\n\n    public VenueCatalogController(VenueCatalogService venueCatalogService, @Value(\"${app.default-org-id}\") Long defaultOrgId) {\n        this.venueCatalogService = venueCatalogService;\n        this.defaultOrgId = defaultOrgId;\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/venues\")\n    public VenueListResponse listVenues(\n        @RequestParam(name = \"cityId\") Long cityId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"orgId\", required = false) Long organizationId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"page\", defaultValue = \"0\") int page,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size\n    ) {\n        Long resolvedOrgId = organizationId != null ? organizationId : defaultOrgId;\n        return venueCatalogService.listVenues(resolvedOrgId, cityId, page, size);\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/venues/{id}\")\n    public VenueResponse getVenue(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long venueId) {\n        return venueCatalogService.getVenue(venueId);\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
