(venue.eventbriteVenueId() == null || venue.eventbriteVenueId().isBlank()) {\n+            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Cannot create slot for venue not yet synced to Eventbrite\", \"VENUE_NOT_SYNCED\");\n+        }\n+        if (request.seatingMode() != null && request.seatingMode().name().equals(\"RESERVED\")\n+            && (request.sourceSeatMapId() == null || request.sourceSeatMapId().isBlank())) {\n+            throw new ValidationException(\"sourceSeatMapId is required for RESERVED seating\", \"SLOT_VALIDATION_ERROR\");\n+        }\n+        validatePricingTiers(request.pricingTiers());\n+    }\n+\n+    private void validatePricingTiers(List<CreateShowSlotRequest.PricingTierRequest> tiers) {\n+    }\n+\n+    private void validatePricingTiers(List<com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.PricingTierRequest> tiers) {\n+        if (tiers == null || tiers.isEmpty()) {\n+            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot must have at least one pricing tier before submission\", \"MISSING_PRICING_TIERS\");\n+        }\n+        for (var tier : tiers) {\n+            if (tier.quota() == null || tier.quota() <= 0) {\n+                throw new ValidationException(\"quota must be greater than 0\", \"SLOT_VALIDATION_ERROR\");\n+            }\n+            if (tier.priceAmount() == null || tier.priceAmount().compareTo(BigDecimal.ZERO) < 0) {\n+                throw new ValidationException(\"priceAmount must be non-negative\", \"SLOT_VALIDATION_ERROR\");\n+            }\n+            if (tier.tierType() != null && tier.tierType().name().equals(\"FREE\")\n+                && tier.priceAmount().compareTo(BigDecimal.ZERO) > 0) {\n+                throw new ValidationException(\"FREE tier must have priceAmount = 0\", \"SLOT_VALIDATION_ERROR\");\n+            }\n+        }\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:08:27.518Z",

  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_qGeGUPSDp2tYfPp5wLrfxATw",
    "output": "apply_patch verification failed: Failed to find expected lines in /home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking/scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/service/ShowSlotService.java:\n    public ShowSlot updateSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId, UpdateShowSlotRequest request) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Cannot update a cancelled slot\", \"SLOT_CANCELLED\");\n        }\n\n        Integer previousCapacity = slot.getCapacity();\n        slot.updateDetails(request.title(), request.description(), request.startTime(), request.endTime(), request.capacity());\n\n        if (request.pricingTiers() != null) {\n            slot.clearPricingTiers();\n            showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers()).forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\n        }\n\n        slot = showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE) {\n            try {\n                ebEventSyncService.updateEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), toEbUpdateRequest(slot));\n                if (request.capacity() != null && !request.capacity().equals(previousCapacity)) {\n                    ebCapacityService.updateCapacityTier(slot.getEbEventId(), request.capacity());\n                }\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n                slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n                showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n                throw ex;\n            }\n        }\n\n        return slot;\n    }"
  }
}

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:08:32.175Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_IlnJXnUO2kUid10NCPom7mZD",
    "output": "Chunk ID: c8802e\nWall time: 0.0525 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 845\nOutput:\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void onTicketSyncFailed(TicketSyncFailedEvent event) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(event.slotId());\n        slot.recordSyncFailure(event.reason());\n        showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), event.reason()));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlot updateSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId, UpdateShowSlotRequest request) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Cannot update a cancelled slot\", \"SLOT_CANCELLED\");\n        }\n\n        Integer previousCapacity = slot.getCapacity();\n        slot.updateDetails(request.title(), request.description(), request.startTime(), request.endTime(), request.capacity());\n\n        if (request.pricingTiers() != null) {\n            slot.clearPricingTiers();\n            showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers()).forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\n        }\n\n        slot = showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE) {\n            try {\n                ebEventSyncService.updateEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), toEbUpdateRequest(slot));\n                if (request.capacity() != null && !request.capacity().equals(previousCapacity)) {\n                    ebCapacityService.updateCapacityTier(slot.getEbEventId(), request.capacity());\n                }\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n                slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n                showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n                throw ex;\n            }\n        }\n\n        return slot;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public boolean cancelSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot already cancelled\", \"SLOT_ALREADY_CANCELLED\");\n        }\n        stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.CANCEL);\n        showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n\n        boolean ebCancelled = true;\n        try {\n            if (slot.getEbEventId() != null) {\n                ebEventSyncService.cancelEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId());\n            }\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            ebCancelled = false;\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n        }\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ShowSlotCancelledEvent(slot.getId(), slot.getEbEventId(), organizationId, slot.getVenueId(), slot.getCityId()));\n        return ebCancelled;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void retrySync(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() != ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot is not pending sync\", \"SLOT_NOT_PENDING\");\n        }\n        if (slot.getEbEventId() == null) {\n            submitSlot(organizationId, slotId);\n            return;\n        }\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotDraftCreatedEvent(\n            slot.getId(),\n            slot.getEbEventId(),\n            slot.getPricingTiers().stream().map(ShowSlotPricingTier::getId).toList(),\n            slot.getSeatingMode(),\n            organizationId,\n"
  }
}

    eventPublisher.publishEvent(new SlotSyncFailedEvent(slot.getId(), event.reason()));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public ShowSlot updateSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId, UpdateShowSlotRequest request) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Cannot update a cancelled slot\", \"SLOT_CANCELLED\");\n        }\n\n        Integer previousCapacity = slot.getCapacity();\n        slot.updateDetails(request.title(), request.description(), request.startTime(), request.endTime(), request.capacity());\n\n        if (request.pricingTiers() != null) {\n            slot.clearPricingTiers();\n            showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers()).forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\n        }\n\n        slot = showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE) {\n            try {\n                ebEventSyncService.updateEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), toEbUpdateRequest(slot));\n                if (request.capacity() != null && !request.capacity().equals(previousCapacity)) {\n                    ebCapacityService.updateCapacityTier(slot.getEbEventId(), request.capacity());\n                }\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n                slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n                showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n                throw ex;\n            }\n        }\n\n        return slot;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public boolean cancelSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot already cancelled\", \"SLOT_ALREADY_CANCELLED\");\n        }\n        stateMachineService.sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.CANCEL);\n        showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n\n        boolean ebCancelled = true;\n        try {\n            if (slot.getEbEventId() != null) {\n                ebEventSyncService.cancelEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId());\n            }\n        } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n            ebCancelled = false;\n            slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n            showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n        }\n        eventPublisher.publishEvent(new ShowSlotCancelledEvent(slot.getId(), slot.getEbEventId(), organizationId, slot.getVenueId(), slot.getCityId()));\n        return ebCancelled;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public void retrySync(Long organizationId, Long slotId) {\n        ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n        if (slot.getStatus() != ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot is not pending sync\", \"SLOT_NOT_PENDING\");\n        }\n slot.getId(),\n            slot.getEbEventId(),\n            slot.getPricingTiers().stream().map(ShowSlotPricingTier::getId).toList(),\n            slot.getSeatingMode(),\n            organizationId,\n"

## Entry 409
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T11:08:55.113Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:08:55.113Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_scy9lru80t8WvjKuWsvXDNh9",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/service/ShowSlotService.java\n@@\n-    public ShowSlot updateSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId, UpdateShowSlotRequest request) {\n+    public ShowSlotUpdateResult updateSlot(Long organizationId, Long slotId, UpdateShowSlotRequest request) {\n         ShowSlot slot = getSlotOrThrow(slotId);\n         if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n             throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Cannot update a cancelled slot\", \"SLOT_CANCELLED\");\n         }\n+        if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC) {\n+            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot cannot be edited while sync is in progress (PENDING_SYNC)\", \"SLOT_PENDING_SYNC\");\n+        }\n+\n+        if (request.startTime() != null || request.endTime() != null) {\n+            CatalogVenueResponse venue = venueCatalogClient.getVenue(slot.getVenueId());\n+            conflictDetectionService.validateOrThrow(organizationId, venue, request.startTime(), request.endTime(), slot.getId());\n+        }\n \n         Integer previousCapacity = slot.getCapacity();\n         slot.updateDetails(request.title(), request.description(), request.startTime(), request.endTime(), request.capacity());\n \n         if (request.pricingTiers() != null) {\n+            validatePricingTiers(request.pricingTiers());\n             slot.clearPricingTiers();\n             showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers()).forEach(slot::addPricingTier);\n         }\n \n         slot = showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n \n+        boolean ebSyncFailed = false;\n         if (slot.getStatus() == ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE) {\n             try {\n                 ebEventSyncService.updateEvent(organizationId, slot.getEbEventId(), toEbUpdateRequest(slot));\n                 if (request.capacity() != null && !request.capacity().equals(previousCapacity)) {\n                     ebCapacityService.updateCapacityTier(slot.getEbEventId(), request.capacity());\n                 }\n             } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n                 slot.recordSyncFailure(ex.getMessage());\n                 showSlotRepository.save(slot);\n-                throw ex;\n+                ebSyncFailed = true;\n             }\n         }\n \n-        return slot;\n+        return new ShowSlotUpdateResult(slot, ebSyncFailed);\n     }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:09:06.018Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_U86TeAqAO2MGvlM1RGpWSCiK",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/service/ShowSlotService.java\n@@\n     private EbEventUpdateRequest toEbUpdateRequest(ShowSlot slot) {\n         return new EbEventUpdateRequest(\n             slot.getTitle(),\n             slot.getDescription(),\n             slot.getStartTime(),\n             slot.getEndTime()\n         );\n     }\n+\n+    private void validateCreateRequest(CatalogVenueResponse venue, CreateShowSlotRequest request) {\n+        if (venue.eventbriteVenueId() == null || venue.eventbriteVenueId().isBlank()) {\n+            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Cannot create slot for venue not yet synced to Eventbrite\", \"VENUE_NOT_SYNCED\");\n+        }\n+        if (request.seatingMode() != null && request.seatingMode().name().equals(\"RESERVED\")\n+            && (request.sourceSeatMapId() == null || request.sourceSeatMapId().isBlank())) {\n+            throw new ValidationException(\"sourceSeatMapId is required for RESERVED seating\", \"SLOT_VALIDATION_ERROR\");\n+        }\n+        validatePricingTiers(request.pricingTiers());\n+    }\n+\n+    private void validatePricingTiers(List<com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.PricingTierRequest> tiers) {\n+        if (tiers == null || tiers.isEmpty()) {\n+            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot must have at least one pricing tier before submission\", \"MISSING_PRICING_TIERS\");\n+        }\n+        for (var tier : tiers) {\n+            if (tier.quota() == null || tier.quota() <= 0) {\n+                throw new ValidationException(\"quota must be greater than 0\", \"SLOT_VALIDATION_ERROR\");\n+            }\n+            if (tier.priceAmount() == null || tier.priceAmount().compareTo(BigDecimal.ZERO) < 0) {\n+                throw new ValidationException(\"priceAmount must be non-negative\", \"SLOT_VALIDATION_ERROR\");\n+            }\n+            if (tier.tierType() != null && tier.tierType().name().equals(\"FREE\")\n+                && tier.priceAmount().compareTo(BigDecimal.ZERO) > 0) {\n+                throw new ValidationException(\"FREE tier must have priceAmount = 0\", \"SLOT_VALIDATION_ERROR\");\n+            }\n+        }\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/api/controller/ShowSlotController.java\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotResponse;\n import com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotRetryResponse;\n import com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotSubmitResponse;\n import com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\n import com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlotOccurrence;\n import com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\n import com.eventplatform.scheduling.mapper.ShowSlotMapper;\n import com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.ShowSlotService;\n+import com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.ShowSlotUpdateResult;\n import com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.PageResponse;\n import com.eventplatform.shared.security.Roles;\n import jakarta.validation.Valid;\n import java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n import java.util.List;\n@@\n import org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\n+import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;\n import org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;\n@@\n     @PutMapping(\"/{id}\")\n     @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n-    public ShowSlotResponse updateSlot(\n+    public ResponseEntity<ShowSlotResponse> updateSlot(\n         @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n         @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId,\n         @Valid @RequestBody UpdateShowSlotRequest request\n     ) {\n-        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.updateSlot(organizationId, slotId, request);\n-        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(slot);\n+        ShowSlotUpdateResult result = showSlotService.updateSlot(organizationId, slotId, request);\n+        ShowSlotResponse response = showSlotMapper.toResponse(result.slot());\n+        if (result.ebSyncFailed()) {\n+            return ResponseEntity.status(207).body(response);\n+        }\n+        return ResponseEntity.ok(response);\n     }\n*** End Patch"
  }

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:09:35.723Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_49pVjWQo6XrVlpBnDXNFselB",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/repository/ShowSlotRepository.java\n@@\n     @Query(\"select s from ShowSlot s where s.venueId = :venueId and s.status <> 'CANCELLED' and s.startTime < :endTime and s.endTime > :startTime\")\n     List<ShowSlot> findConflicts(\n         @Param(\"venueId\") Long venueId,\n         @Param(\"startTime\") ZonedDateTime startTime,\n         @Param(\"endTime\") ZonedDateTime endTime\n     );\n+\n+    @Query(\"select s from ShowSlot s where s.venueId = :venueId and s.status <> 'CANCELLED' and s.startTime < :endTime and s.endTime > :startTime and (:excludeId is null or s.id <> :excludeId)\")\n+    List<ShowSlot> findConflictsExcludingId(\n+        @Param(\"venueId\") Long venueId,\n+        @Param(\"startTime\") ZonedDateTime startTime,\n+        @Param(\"endTime\") ZonedDateTime endTime,\n+        @Param(\"excludeId\") Long excludeId\n+    );\n+\n+    @Query(\"select s from ShowSlot s where s.venueId = :venueId and s.status <> 'CANCELLED' and s.endTime <= :startTime and (:excludeId is null or s.id <> :excludeId) order by s.endTime desc\")\n+    Optional<ShowSlot> findPrevSlotForGap(\n+        @Param(\"venueId\") Long venueId,\n+        @Param(\"startTime\") ZonedDateTime startTime,\n+        @Param(\"excludeId\") Long excludeId\n+    );\n+\n+    @Query(\"select s from ShowSlot s where s.venueId = :venueId and s.status <> 'CANCELLED' and s.startTime >= :endTime and (:excludeId is null or s.id <> :excludeId) order by s.startTime asc\")\n+    Optional<ShowSlot> findNextSlotForGap(\n+        @Param(\"venueId\") Long venueId,\n+        @Param(\"endTime\") ZonedDateTime endTime,\n+        @Param(\"excludeId\") Long excludeId\n+    );\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

## Entry 434
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T11:10:03.390Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:10:03.390Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_Bm6Lv4iuQ4ROz78XYEnUFvgi",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: scheduling/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/service/ConflictDetectionService.java\n@@\n     public void validateOrThrow(Long organizationId, CatalogVenueResponse venue, ZonedDateTime startTime, ZonedDateTime endTime) {\n-        List<ShowSlot> overlaps = showSlotRepository.findConflicts(venue.id(), startTime, endTime);\n-        boolean gapViolation = hasGapViolation(venue.id(), startTime, endTime);\n+        validateOrThrow(organizationId, venue, startTime, endTime, null);\n+    }\n+\n+    public void validateOrThrow(\n+        Long organizationId,\n+        CatalogVenueResponse venue,\n+        ZonedDateTime startTime,\n+        ZonedDateTime endTime,\n+        Long excludeSlotId\n+    ) {\n+        List<ShowSlot> overlaps = showSlotRepository.findConflictsExcludingId(venue.id(), startTime, endTime, excludeSlotId);\n+        boolean gapViolation = hasGapViolation(venue.id(), startTime, endTime, excludeSlotId);\n \n         if (!overlaps.isEmpty() || gapViolation) {\n-            ConflictAlternativeResponse alternatives = buildAlternatives(organizationId, venue, startTime, endTime);\n+            ConflictAlternativeResponse alternatives = buildAlternatives(organizationId, venue, startTime, endTime, excludeSlotId);\n             throw new SlotConflictException(\"Venue has an overlapping slot or turnaround gap violation\", alternatives);\n         }\n     }\n \n-    private boolean hasGapViolation(Long venueId, ZonedDateTime startTime, ZonedDateTime endTime) {\n-        return showSlotRepository.findFirstByVenueIdAndEndTimeLessThanEqualOrderByEndTimeDesc(venueId, startTime)\n+    private boolean hasGapViolation(Long venueId, ZonedDateTime startTime, ZonedDateTime endTime, Long excludeSlotId) {\n+        return showSlotRepository.findPrevSlotForGap(venueId, startTime, excludeSlotId)\n             .map(slot -> Duration.between(slot.getEndTime(), startTime).compareTo(gapPolicy) < 0)\n             .orElse(false)\n-            || showSlotRepository.findFirstByVenueIdAndStartTimeGreaterThanEqualOrderByStartTimeAsc(venueId, endTime)\n+            || showSlotRepository.findNextSlotForGap(venueId, endTime, excludeSlotId)\n                 .map(slot -> Duration.between(endTime, slot.getStartTime()).compareTo(gapPolicy) < 0)\n                 .orElse(false);\n     }\n \n     private ConflictAlternativeResponse buildAlternatives(\n         Long organizationId,\n         CatalogVenueResponse venue,\n         ZonedDateTime startTime,\n-        ZonedDateTime endTime\n+        ZonedDateTime endTime,\n+        Long excludeSlotId\n     ) {\n         Duration duration = Duration.between(startTime, endTime);\n \n-        TimeWindowOption sameVenue = showSlotRepository\n-            .findFirstByVenueIdAndEndTimeLessThanEqualOrderByEndTimeDesc(venue.id(), startTime)\n-            .map(prev -> new TimeWindowOption(prev.getEndTime().plus(gapPolicy), prev.getEndTime().plus(gapPolicy).plus(duration)))\n-            .orElse(new TimeWindowOption(startTime.plusDays(1), endTime.plusDays(1)));\n+        List<TimeWindowOption> sameVenueAlternatives = buildSameVenueAlternatives(venue.id(), startTime, endTime, duration, excludeSlotId);\n \n-        TimeWindowOption adjusted = showSlotRepository\n-            .findFirstByVenueIdAndStartTimeGreaterThanEqualOrderByStartTimeAsc(venue.id(), endTime)\n-            .map(next -> {\n-                ZonedDateTime newEnd = next.getStartTime().minus(gapPolicy);\n-                ZonedDateTime newStart = newEnd.minus(duration);\n-                return new TimeWindowOption(newStart, newEnd);\n-            })\n-            .orElse(sameVenue);\n+        TimeWindowOption adjusted = showSlotRepository\n+            .findPrevSlotForGap(venue.id(), startTime, excludeSlotId)\n+            .map(prev -> {\n+                ZonedDateTime newStart = prev.getEndTime().plus(gapPolicy).plusMinutes(1);\n+                return new TimeWindowOption(newStart, newStart.plus(duration));\n+            })\n+            .orElseGet(() -> sameVenueAlternatives.isEmpty()\n+                ? new TimeWindowOption(startTime.plusDays(1), endTime.plusDays(1))\n+                : sameVenueAlternatives.getFirst());\n \n         int venueCapacity = venue.capacity() == null ? 0 : venue.capacity();\n         List<VenueOption> nearby = venueCatalogClient.listVenuesByCity(venue.cityId(), organizationId).stream()\n             .filter(candidate -> !candidate.id().equals(venue.id()))\n+            .filter(candidate -> candidate.eventbriteVenueId() != null && !candidate.eventbriteVenueId().isBlank())\n             .sorted(Comparator.comparingInt(candidate -> {\n                 int candidateCapacity = candidate.capacity() == null ? 0 : candidate.capacity();\n                 return Math.abs(candidateCapacity - venueCapacity);\n             }))\n             .limit(3)\n             .map(candidate -> new VenueOption(candidate.id(), candidate.name(), String.valueOf(venue.cityId()),\n                 candidate.capacity() == null ? 0 : candidate.capacity()))\n             .toList();\n \n         return new ConflictAlternativeResponse(\n-            List.of(sameVenue),\n+            sameVenueAlternatives,\n             nearby,\n             List.of(adjusted)\n         );\n     }\n+\n+    private List<TimeWindowOption> buildSameVenueAlternatives(\n+        Long venueId,\n+        ZonedDateTime startTime,\n+        ZonedDateTime endTime,\n+        Duration duration,\n+        Long excludeSlotId\n+    ) {\n+        List<TimeWindowOption> options = new java.util.ArrayList<>();\n+        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {\n+            ZonedDateTime candidateStart = endTime.plus(gapPolicy).plus(duration.multipliedBy(i));\n+            ZonedDateTime candidateEnd = candidateStart.plus(duration);\n+            boolean conflict = !showSlotRepository\n+                .findConflictsExcludingId(venueId, candidateStart, candidateEnd, excludeSlotId)\n+                .isEmpty();\n+            boolean gapViolation = hasGapViolation(venueId, candidateStart, candidateEnd, excludeSlotId);\n+            if (!conflict && !gapViolation) {\n+                options.add(new TimeWindowOption(candidateStart, candidateEnd));\n+            }\n+        }\n+        return options;\n+    }\n }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}

## Entry 449
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T11:10:35.204Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:10:35.204Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_fv6aPCvaRSkNtJ4AOu9vwcJh",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: discovery-catalog/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/service/VenueService.java\n@@\n         try {\n             EbVenueResponse response = ebVenueService.createVenue(organizationId, toEbRequest(request));\n             venue.markSynced(response.id());\n             return venueRepository.save(venue);\n         } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n             venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\n             venueRepository.save(venue);\n-            throw ex;\n+            return venue;\n         } catch (Exception ex) {\n             venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\n             venueRepository.save(venue);\n-            throw new CatalogSyncException(\"Failed to sync venue with Eventbrite\", ex);\n+            return venue;\n         }\n     }\n@@\n         try {\n             if (venue.getEventbriteVenueId() != null) {\n                 ebVenueService.updateVenue(organizationId, venue.getEventbriteVenueId(), toEbRequest(request));\n                 venue.markSynced(venue.getEventbriteVenueId());\n             } else {\n                 EbVenueResponse response = ebVenueService.createVenue(organizationId, toEbRequest(request));\n                 venue.markSynced(response.id());\n             }\n             venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\n         } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n-            venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\n+            venue.markDrift(ex.getMessage());\n             venueRepository.save(venue);\n-            throw ex;\n         } finally {\n             snapshotCache.invalidate(organizationId, venue.getCityId());\n         }\n@@\n         try {\n             EbVenueResponse response;\n             if (venue.getEventbriteVenueId() == null) {\n                 response = ebVenueService.createVenue(organizationId, toEbRequest(venue));\n                 venue.markSynced(response.id());\n             } else {\n                 response = ebVenueService.updateVenue(organizationId, venue.getEventbriteVenueId(), toEbRequest(venue));\n                 venue.markSynced(Optional.ofNullable(response.id()).orElse(venue.getEventbriteVenueId()));\n             }\n             venue = venueRepository.save(venue);\n             return venue;\n         } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n             venue.markSyncFailed(ex.getMessage());\n             venueRepository.save(venue);\n-            throw ex;\n+            return venue;\n         } finally {\n             snapshotCache.invalidate(organizationId, venue.getCityId());\n         }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: admin/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/admin/service/OrgOAuthService.java\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrganizationAuth;\n import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTokenStore;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.ValidationException;\n import java.time.Duration;\n import java.time.Instant;\n@@\n     private void validateState(Long orgId, String state) {\n         StateEntry entry = stateStore.remove(state);\n         if (entry == null || !entry.orgId().equals(orgId)) {\n-            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"Invalid OAuth state\");\n+            throw new ValidationException(\"OAuth state mismatch or expired. Restart the connection flow.\", \"OAUTH_STATE_INVALID\");\n         }\n         if (entry.createdAt().isBefore(Instant.now().minus(STATE_TTL))) {\n-            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"OAuth state expired\");\n+            throw new ValidationException(\"OAuth state mismatch or expired. Restart the connection flow.\", \"OAUTH_STATE_EXPIRED\");\n         }\n     }\n*** End Patch"
  }
}

## Entry 487
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T11:11:27.055Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:11:27.055Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Adding positive capacity validation**\n\nI'm adding the @Positive annotation to capacity in both CreateVenueRequest and UpdateVenueRequest to ensure capacity is positive when provided, since @Positive allows null and tests expect 400 on negative values."
  }
}
```

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:11:57.176Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Designing comprehensive ShowSlot and service tests**\n\nI'm defining ShowSlot domain tests covering status transitions and validation using helpers for slot creation and pricing tiers, including BusinessRuleException checks. For ShowSlotService tests, I'm planning Mockito mocks for dependencies and outlining key scenarios like slot creation, error handling for venue sync and conflicts, and state transitions with event syncing verification."
  }
}
```

    "output": "Chunk ID: 81138d\nWall time: 0.0516 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 674\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain;\n\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.BaseEntity;\nimport jakarta.persistence.Column;\nimport jakarta.persistence.Entity;\nimport jakarta.persistence.EnumType;\nimport jakarta.persistence.Enumerated;\nimport jakarta.persistence.Table;\nimport java.time.Instant;\n\n@Entity\n@Table(name = \"organization_auth\")\npublic class OrganizationAuth extends BaseEntity {\n\n    @Column(name = \"organization_id\", nullable = false, unique = true)\n    private Long organizationId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"eb_organization_id\", nullable = false)\n    private String ebOrganizationId;\n\n    @Column(name = \"access_token_encrypted\", nullable = false)\n    private String accessTokenEncrypted;\n\n    @Column(name = \"refresh_token_encrypted\")\n    private String refreshTokenEncrypted;\n\n    @Column(name = \"expires_at\")\n    private Instant expiresAt;\n\n    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)\n    @Column(name = \"status\", nullable = false)\n    private OrgAuthStatus status;\n\n    protected OrganizationAuth() {\n    }\n\n    public OrganizationAuth(Long organizationId, String ebOrganizationId, String accessTokenEncrypted) {\n        this.organizationId = organizationId;\n        this.ebOrganizationId = ebOrganizationId;\n        this.accessTokenEncrypted = accessTokenEncrypted;\n        this.status = OrgAuthStatus.PENDING;\n    }\n\n    public Long getOrganizationId() {\n        return organizationId;\n    }\n\n    public String getEbOrganizationId() {\n        return ebOrganizationId;\n    }\n\n    public String getAccessTokenEncrypted() {\n        return accessTokenEncrypted;\n    }\n\n    public String getRefreshTokenEncrypted() {\n        return refreshTokenEncrypted;\n    }\n\n    public Instant getExpiresAt() {\n        return expiresAt;\n    }\n\n    public OrgAuthStatus getStatus() {\n        return status;\n    }\n\n    public void markConnected(String accessTokenEncrypted, String refreshTokenEncrypted, Instant expiresAt) {\n        this.accessTokenEncrypted = accessTokenEncrypted;\n        this.refreshTokenEncrypted = refreshTokenEncrypted;\n        this.expiresAt = expiresAt;\n        this.status = OrgAuthStatus.CONNECTED;\n    }\n\n    public void markTokenExpired() {\n        this.status = OrgAuthStatus.TOKEN_EXPIRED;\n    }\n\n    public void markRevoked() {\n        this.status = OrgAuthStatus.REVOKED;\n    }\n\n    public void updateTokens(String accessTokenEncrypted, String refreshTokenEncrypted, Instant expiresAt) {\n        this.accessTokenEncrypted = accessTokenEncrypted;\n        if (refreshTokenEncrypted != null) {\n            this.refreshTokenEncrypted = refreshTokenEncrypted;\n        }\n        this.expiresAt = expiresAt;\n        this.status = OrgAuthStatus.CONNECTED;\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

## Entry 526
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T11:12:46.566Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:12:46.566Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_kMu8l61nrhiXJBIiIny9RajZ",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: scheduling/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/domain/ShowSlotTest.java\n+package com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain;\n+\n+import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\n+import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThatThrownBy;\n+\n+import com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\n+import com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.TierType;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\n+import java.math.BigDecimal;\n+import java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n+\n+class ShowSlotTest {\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_transition_to_PENDING_SYNC_when_slot_is_DRAFT_and_has_pricing_tiers() {\n+        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n+        slot.addPricingTier(new ShowSlotPricingTier(\"General\", new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, \"INR\"), 10, TierType.FREE));\n+\n+        slot.submit();\n+\n+        assertThat(slot.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_transition_to_ACTIVE_when_slot_is_PENDING_SYNC() {\n+        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n+        slot.addPricingTier(new ShowSlotPricingTier(\"General\", new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, \"INR\"), 10, TierType.FREE));\n+        slot.markPendingSync();\n+\n+        slot.activate();\n+\n+        assertThat(slot.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_transition_to_CANCELLED_when_slot_is_ACTIVE() {\n+        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n+        slot.markActive();\n+\n+        slot.cancel();\n+\n+        assertThat(slot.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_throw_BusinessRuleException_when_submitting_non_DRAFT_slot() {\n+        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n+        slot.markPendingSync();\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(slot::submit)\n+            .isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_throw_BusinessRuleException_when_transitioning_CANCELLED_slot_to_any_state() {\n+        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n+        slot.markCancelled();\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(slot::cancel)\n+            .isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class);\n+    }\n+\n+    private ShowSlot baseSlot() {\n+        return new ShowSlot(\n+            1L,\n+            10L,\n+            20L,\n+            \"Show\",\n+            \"Desc\",\n+            ZonedDateTime.now().plusDays(1),\n+            ZonedDateTime.now().plusDays(1).plusHours(2),\n+            SeatingMode.GA,\n+            100,\n+            false,\n+            null,\n+            null\n+        );\n+    }\n+}\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

## Entry 531
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T11:12:52.857Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:12:52.857Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_WtiKfkqP2dG88yy09deiVlg8",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: scheduling/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/domain/ShowSlotPricingTierTest.java\n+package com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain;\n+\n+import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThatThrownBy;\n+\n+import com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.TierType;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\n+import java.math.BigDecimal;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n+\n+class ShowSlotPricingTierTest {\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_allow_zero_priceAmount_for_FREE_tier() {\n+        new ShowSlotPricingTier(\"Free\", new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, \"INR\"), 5, TierType.FREE);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_throw_BusinessRuleException_when_FREE_tier_has_non_zero_priceAmount() {\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() ->\n+            new ShowSlotPricingTier(\"Free\", new Money(new BigDecimal(\"10.00\"), \"INR\"), 5, TierType.FREE)\n+        ).isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class);\n+    }\n+}\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:13:10.686Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Implementing core service tests**\n\nI'm creating ShowSlotServiceTest with MockitoExtension, using @InjectMocks and mocks for dependencies, especially ShowSlotMapper and venueCatalogClient. I’m building helpers for slots and requests, then implementing key tests covering successful creation, venue not found, pending venue sync, conflict detection, and reserved seatmap validation exceptions."
  }
}
```

## Entry 535
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T11:13:10.696Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:13:10.696Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_reasoning",
    "text": "**Expanding service tests with submission, update, and cancel scenarios**\n\nI'm adding tests covering submitSlot success and failure with event sync and event publishing verification, onTicketSyncComplete handling of success and failure including state transitions, updateSlot behavior under active and pending states with sync error handling, and cancelSlot scenarios for both successful and failed event cancellation integrating state and return value assertions."
  }
}
```

        "text": "**Implementing core service tests**\n\nI'm creating ShowSlotServiceTest with MockitoExtension, using @InjectMocks and mocks for dependencies, especially ShowSlotMapper and venueCatalogClient.     "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: scheduling/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/scheduling/service/ShowSlotServiceTest.java\n+package com.eventplatform.scheduling.service;\n+\n+import static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\n+\n+import com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.CreateShowSlotRequest;\n+import com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.request.PricingTierRequest;\n+import com.eventplatform.scheduling.mapper.ShowSlotMapper;\n+import com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository;\n+import com.eventplatform.scheduling.repository.ShowSlotRepository;\n+import com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.client.CatalogVenueResponse;\n+import com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.client.VenueCatalogClient;\n+import com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotEvent;\n+import com.eventplatform.scheduling.statemachine.ShowSlotStateMachineService;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.domain.Money;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.ShowSlotActivatedEvent;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.SlotDraftCreatedEvent;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.SlotSyncFailedEvent;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.BusinessRuleException;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.ValidationException;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbEventDto;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbCapacityService;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbEventSyncService;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbScheduleService;\n+import java.math.BigDecimal;\n+import java.time.Instant;\n+import java.time.ZonedDateTime;\n+import java.util.List;\n+import java.util.Optional;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\n+import org.mockito.ArgumentCaptor;\n+import org.mockito.InjectMocks;\n+import org.mockito.Mock;\n+import org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\n+import org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\n+\n+@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\n+class ShowSlotServiceTest {\n+\n+    @Mock\n+    private ShowSlotRepository showSlotRepository;\n+    @Mock\n+    private ShowSlotOccurrenceRepository occurrenceRepository;\n+    @Mock\n+    private ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper;\n+    @Mock\n+    private VenueCatalogClient venueCatalogClient;\n+    @Mock\n+    private ConflictDetectionService conflictDetectionService;\n+    @Mock\n+    private EbEventSyncService ebEventSyncService;\n+    @Mock\n+    private EbScheduleService ebScheduleService;\n+    @Mock\n+    private EbCapacityService ebCapacityService;\n+    @Mock\n+    private ShowSlotStateMachineService stateMachineService;\n+    @Mock\n+    private ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\n+\n+    @InjectMocks\n+    private ShowSlotService showSlotService;\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_create_slot_in_DRAFT_status_when_venue_is_synced_and_no_conflict() {\n+        CreateShowSlotRequest request = baseCreateRequest(SeatingMode.GA, null);\n+        CatalogVenueResponse venue = new CatalogVenueResponse(10L, 20L, \"eb-1\", \"Venue\", \"Addr\", 100, SeatingMode.GA);\n+        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n+        List<ShowSlotPricingTier> tiers = List.of(\n+            new ShowSlotPricingTier(\"General\", new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, \"INR\"), 10, TierType.FREE)\n+        );\n+\n+        when(venueCatalogClient.getVenue(request.venueId())).thenReturn(venue);\n+        when(showSlotMapper.toEntity(eq(1L), eq(request.venueId()), eq(venue.cityId()), eq(request))).thenReturn(slot);\n+        when(showSlotMapper.toPricingTiers(request.pricingTiers())).thenReturn(tiers);\n+        when(showSlotRepository.save(slot)).thenReturn(slot);\n+\n+        ShowSlot result = showSlotService.createSlot(1L, request);\n+\n+        assertThat(result.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ShowSlotStatus.DRAFT);\n+        verify(showSlotRepository).save(slot);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_throw_SchedulingNotFoundException_when_venue_not_found_via_rest_call() {\n+        CreateShowSlotRequest request = baseCreateRequest(SeatingMode.GA, null);\n+        when(venueCatalogClient.getVenue(request.venueId()))\n+            .thenThrow(new SchedulingNotFoundException(\"Venue not found\", \"VENUE_NOT_FOUND\"));\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> showSlotService.createSlot(1L, request))\n+            .isInstanceOf(SchedulingNotFoundException.class);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_throw_BusinessRuleException_when_venue_sync_status_is_PENDING_SYNC() {\n+        CreateShowSlotRequest request = baseCreateRequest(SeatingMode.GA, null);\n+        CatalogVenueResponse venue = new CatalogVenueResponse(10L, 20L, null, \"Venue\", \"Addr\", 100, SeatingMode.GA);\n+        when(venueCatalogClient.getVenue(request.venueId())).thenReturn(venue);\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> showSlotService.createSlot(1L, request))\n+            .isInstanceOf(BusinessRuleException.class);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_throw_SlotConflictException_with_alternatives_when_overlap_detected() {\n+        CreateShowSlotRequest request = baseCreateRequest(SeatingMode.GA, null);\n+        CatalogVenueResponse venue = new CatalogVenueResponse(10L, 20L, \"eb-1\", \"Venue\", \"Addr\", 100, SeatingMode.GA);\n+        when(venueCatalogClient.getVenue(request.venueId())).thenReturn(venue);\n+        doAnswer(invocation -> {\n+            throw new SlotConflictException(\"Conflict\", null);\n+        }).when(conflictDetectionService).validateOrThrow(eq(1L), eq(venue), eq(request.startTime()), eq(request.endTime()));\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> showSlotService.createSlot(1L, request))\n+            .isInstanceOf(SlotConflictException.class);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_throw_ValidationException_when_RESERVED_slot_has_no_sourceSeatMapId() {\n+        CreateShowSlotRequest request = baseCreateRequest(SeatingMode.RESERVED, null);\n+        CatalogVenueResponse venue = new CatalogVenueResponse(10L, 20L, \"eb-1\", \"Venue\", \"Addr\", 100, SeatingMode.RESERVED);\n+        when(venueCatalogClient.getVenue(request.venueId())).thenReturn(venue);\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> showSlotService.createSlot(1L, request))\n+            .isInstanceOf(ValidationException.class);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_transition_to_PENDING_SYNC_and_call_createDraft_when_slot_is_DRAFT() {\n+        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n+        slot.addPricingTier(new ShowSlotPricingTier(\"General\", new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, \"INR\"), 10, TierType.FREE));\n+        when(showSlotRepository.findById(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(slot));\n+        when(ebEventSyncService.createDraft(eq(1L), any())).thenReturn(new EbEventDto(\"eb-1\", null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, Instant.now()));\n+\n+        ShowSlot result = showSlotService.submitSlot(1L, 1L);\n+\n+        verify(stateMachineService).sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.SUBMIT);\n+        assertThat(result.getEbEventId()).isEqualTo(\"eb-1\");\n+        ArgumentCaptor<SlotDraftCreatedEvent> captor = ArgumentCaptor.forClass(SlotDraftCreatedEvent.class);\n+        verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(captor.capture());\n+        assertThat(captor.getValue().ebEventId()).isEqualTo(\"eb-1\");\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_increment_syncAttemptCount_and_not_publish_success_event_when_createDraft_fails() {\n+        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n+        slot.addPricingTier(new ShowSlotPricingTier(\"General\", new Money(BigDecimal.ZERO, \"INR\"), 10, TierType.FREE));\n+        when(showSlotRepository.findById(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(slot));\n+        when(ebEventSyncService.createDraft(eq(1L), any())).thenThrow(new EbIntegrationException(\"boom\"));\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> showSlotService.submitSlot(1L, 1L))\n+            .isInstanceOf(EbIntegrationException.class);\n+\n+        assertThat(slot.getSyncAttemptCount()).isEqualTo(1);\n+        verify(eventPublisher, never()).publishEvent(any(SlotDraftCreatedEvent.class));\n+        verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(any(SlotSyncFailedEvent.class));\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_transition_to_ACTIVE_when_publishEvent_succeeds() {\n+        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n+        slot.markPendingSync();\n+        slot.setEbEventId(\"eb-1\");\n+        when(showSlotRepository.findById(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(slot));\n+        doAnswer(invocation -> {\n+            slot.markActive();\n+            return null;\n+        }).when(stateMachineService).sendEvent(slot, ShowSlotEvent.EB_PUBLISHED);\n+\n+        showSlotService.onTicketSyncComplete(new com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncCompletedEvent(1L, \"eb-1\"));\n+\n+        assertThat(slot.getStatus()).isEqualTo(ShowSlotStatus.ACTIVE);\n+        verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(any(ShowSlotActivatedEvent.class));\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_increment_syncAttemptCount_and_stay_PENDING_SYNC_when_publishEvent_fails() {\n+        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n+        slot.markPendingSync();\n+        slot.setEbEventId(\"eb-1\");\n+        when(showSlotRepository.findById(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(slot));\n+        when(ebEventSyncService.publishEvent(eq(1L), eq(\"eb-1\")))\n+            .thenThrow(new EbIntegrationException(\"boom\"));\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> showSlotService.onTicketSyncComplete(\n+            new com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncCompletedEvent(1L, \"eb-1\")))\n+            .isInstanceOf(EbIntegrationException.class);\n+\n+        assertThat(slot.getSyncAttemptCount()).isEqualTo(1);\n+        verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(any(SlotSyncFailedEvent.class));\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_persist_update_and_call_updateEvent_when_slot_is_ACTIVE() {\n+        ShowSlot slot = baseSlot();\n+        slot.markActive();\n+        slot.setEbEventId(\"eb-1\");\n+        when(showSlotRepository.findById(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(slot));\n+        when(showSlotRepository.save(slot)).thenReturn(slot);\n+\n+        ShowSlotUpdateResult result = showSlotService.updateSlot(1L, 1L, new UpdateShowSlotRequest(\"New\", null, null, null, null, null));\n+\n+        assertThat(result.ebSyncFailed()).isFalse();\n+ **Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:14:35.697Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_i6mQ3uW9yY6yi9BB1vMunQKd",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: booking-inventory/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/SlotTicketSyncServiceTest.java\n+package com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service;\n+\n+import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThatThrownBy;\n+import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.any;\n+import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.eq;\n+import static org.mockito.Mockito.never;\n+import static org.mockito.Mockito.verify;\n+import static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\n+\n+import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingPricingTierResponse;\n+import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingSlotClient;\n+import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.SchedulingSlotResponse;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.SlotDraftCreatedEvent;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncCompletedEvent;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.TicketSyncFailedEvent;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTicketService;\n+import java.math.BigDecimal;\n+import java.util.List;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\n+import org.mockito.InjectMocks;\n+import org.mockito.Mock;\n+import org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\n+import org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\n+\n+@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\n+class SlotTicketSyncServiceTest {\n+\n+    @Mock\n+    private EbTicketService ebTicketService;\n+    @Mock\n+    private SchedulingSlotClient schedulingSlotClient;\n+    @Mock\n+    private ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\n+\n+    @InjectMocks\n+    private SlotTicketSyncService slotTicketSyncService;\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_call_createTicketClasses_and_inventoryTiers_when_syncing() {\n+        when(schedulingSlotClient.getSlot(1L)).thenReturn(baseSlot(SeatingMode.GA, null));\n+\n+        slotTicketSyncService.syncTickets(new SlotDraftCreatedEvent(1L, \"eb-1\", List.of(1L), SeatingMode.GA, 1L, null));\n+\n+        verify(ebTicketService).createTicketClasses(eq(\"eb-1\"), any());\n+        verify(ebTicketService).createInventoryTiers(eq(\"eb-1\"), any());\n+        verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(any(TicketSyncCompletedEvent.class));\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_call_copySeatMap_when_seatingMode_is_RESERVED() {\n+        when(schedulingSlotClient.getSlot(1L)).thenReturn(baseSlot(SeatingMode.RESERVED, \"seatmap-1\"));\n+\n+        slotTicketSyncService.syncTickets(new SlotDraftCreatedEvent(1L, \"eb-1\", List.of(1L), SeatingMode.RESERVED, 1L, \"seatmap-1\"));\n+\n+        verify(ebTicketService).copySeatMap(\"eb-1\", \"seatmap-1\");\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_not_call_copySeatMap_when_seatingMode_is_GA() {\n+        when(schedulingSlotClient.getSlot(1L)).thenReturn(baseSlot(SeatingMode.GA, null));\n+\n+        slotTicketSyncService.syncTickets(new SlotDraftCreatedEvent(1L, \"eb-1\", List.of(1L), SeatingMode.GA, 1L, null));\n+\n+        verify(ebTicketService, never()).copySeatMap(any(), any());\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_publish_TicketSyncFailedEvent_when_ticket_class_creation_fails() {\n+        when(schedulingSlotClient.getSlot(1L)).thenReturn(baseSlot(SeatingMode.GA, null));\n+        when(ebTicketService.createTicketClasses(eq(\"eb-1\"), any()))\n+            .thenThrow(new EbIntegrationException(\"boom\"));\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> slotTicketSyncService.syncTickets(\n+            new SlotDraftCreatedEvent(1L, \"eb-1\", List.of(1L), SeatingMode.GA, 1L, null)))\n+            .isInstanceOf(EbIntegrationException.class);\n+\n+        verify(eventPublisher).publishEvent(any(TicketSyncFailedEvent.class));\n+    }\n+\n+    private SchedulingSlotResponse baseSlot(SeatingMode mode, String seatMapId) {\n+        return new SchedulingSlotResponse(\n+            1L,\n+            \"eb-1\",\n+            mode,\n+            seatMapId,\n+            List.of(new SchedulingPricingTierResponse(1L, \"Free\", BigDecimal.ZERO, \"INR\", 10, \"FREE\", null))\n+        );\n+    }\n+}\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

## Entry 552
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T11:15:16.178Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:15:16.178Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_QnuTsgN1DgmUyRvV9nxmDT7T",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: discovery-catalog/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/discoverycatalog/service/VenueServiceTest.java\n+package com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service;\n+\n+import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\n+import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThatThrownBy;\n+import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.any;\n+import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.eq;\n+import static org.mockito.Mockito.verify;\n+import static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\n+\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.request.CreateVenueRequest;\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.api.dto.request.UpdateVenueRequest;\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.Venue;\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.domain.enums.VenueSyncStatus;\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.exception.CatalogNotFoundException;\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.exception.InvalidCatalogSearchException;\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.mapper.VenueMapper;\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.CityRepository;\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.repository.VenueRepository;\n+import com.eventplatform.discoverycatalog.service.cache.EventCatalogSnapshotCache;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbVenueResponse;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbIntegrationException;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbVenueService;\n+import java.util.List;\n+import java.util.Optional;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\n+import org.mockito.InjectMocks;\n+import org.mockito.Mock;\n+import org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\n+import org.springframework.data.domain.PageImpl;\n+import org.springframework.data.domain.PageRequest;\n+\n+@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\n+class VenueServiceTest {\n+\n+    @Mock\n+    private VenueRepository venueRepository;\n+    @Mock\n+    private CityRepository cityRepository;\n+    @Mock\n+    private VenueMapper venueMapper;\n+    @Mock\n+    private EbVenueService ebVenueService;\n+    @Mock\n+    private EventCatalogSnapshotCache snapshotCache;\n+\n+    @InjectMocks\n+    private VenueService venueService;\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_persist_venue_and_set_SYNCED_when_EB_creation_succeeds() {\n+        CreateVenueRequest request = baseCreateRequest();\n+        Venue venue = baseVenue();\n+        when(cityRepository.existsById(request.cityId())).thenReturn(true);\n+        when(venueRepository.findByOrganizationIdAndCityId(eq(1L), eq(request.cityId()), any(PageRequest.class)))\n+            .thenReturn(new PageImpl<>(List.of()));\n+        when(venueMapper.toEntity(1L, request)).thenReturn(venue);\n+        when(venueRepository.save(venue)).thenReturn(venue);\n+        when(ebVenueService.createVenue(eq(1L), any()))\n+            .thenReturn(new EbVenueResponse(\"eb-1\", \"Venue\", \"Addr\", \"City\", \"IN\", \"123\", null, null));\n+\n+        Venue result = venueService.createVenue(1L, request);\n+\n+        assertThat(result.getSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(VenueSyncStatus.SYNCED);\n+        assertThat(result.getEventbriteVenueId()).isEqualTo(\"eb-1\");\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_persist_venue_and_return_202_when_EB_create_fails() {\n+        CreateVenueRequest request = baseCreateRequest();\n+        Venue venue = baseVenue();\n+        when(cityRepository.existsById(request.cityId())).thenReturn(true);\n+        when(venueRepository.findByOrganizationIdAndCityId(eq(1L), eq(request.cityId()), any(PageRequest.class)))\n+            .thenReturn(new PageImpl<>(List.of()));\n+        when(venueMapper.toEntity(1L, request)).thenReturn(venue);\n+        when(venueRepository.save(venue)).thenReturn(venue);\n+        when(ebVenueService.createVenue(eq(1L), any()))\n+            .thenThrow(new EbIntegrationException(\"boom\"));\n+\n+        Venue result = venueService.createVenue(1L, request);\n+\n+        assertThat(result.getSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(VenueSyncStatus.PENDING_SYNC);\n+        assertThat(result.getLastSyncError()).isNotNull();\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_update_venue_and_call_updateVenue_when_eb_venue_id_present() {\n+        UpdateVenueRequest request = baseUpdateRequest();\n+        Venue venue = baseVenue();\n+        venue.markSynced(\"eb-1\");\n+        when(venueRepository.findById(10L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(venue));\n+        when(venueRepository.save(venue)).thenReturn(venue);\n+        when(ebVenueService.updateVenue(eq(1L), eq(\"eb-1\"), any()))\n+            .thenReturn(new EbVenueResponse(\"eb-1\", \"Venue\", \"Addr\", \"City\", \"IN\", \"123\", null, null));\n+\n+        Venue result = venueService.updateVenue(1L, 10L, request);\n+\n+        assertThat(result.getSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(VenueSyncStatus.SYNCED);\n+        verify(snapshotCache).invalidate(1L, venue.getCityId());\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_set_DRIFT_FLAGGED_when_updateVenue_fails() {\n+        UpdateVenueRequest request = baseUpdateRequest();\n+        Venue venue = baseVenue();\n+        venue.markSynced(\"eb-1\");\n+        when(venueRepository.findById(10L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(venue));\n+        when(venueRepository.save(venue)).thenReturn(venue);\n+        when(ebVenueService.updateVenue(eq(1L), eq(\"eb-1\"), any()))\n+            .thenThrow(new EbIntegrationException(\"boom\"));\n+\n+        Venue result = venueService.updateVenue(1L, 10L, request);\n+\n+        assertThat(result.getSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(VenueSyncStatus.DRIFT_FLAGGED);\n+        verify(snapshotCache).invalidate(1L, venue.getCityId());\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_throw_CatalogNotFoundException_when_venue_not_found_by_id() {\n+        when(venueRepository.findById(10L)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> venueService.updateVenue(1L, 10L, baseUpdateRequest()))\n+            .isInstanceOf(CatalogNotFoundException.class);\n+    }\n+\n+    private CreateVenueRequest baseCreateRequest() {\n+        return new CreateVenueRequest(\n+            \"Venue\",\n+            \"Addr1\",\n+            \"Addr2\",\n+            3L,\n+            \"IN\",\n+            \"123\",\n+            \"12.9\",\n+            \"77.6\",\n+            100,\n+            SeatingMode.GA\n+        );\n+    }\n+\n+    private UpdateVenueRequest baseUpdateRequest() {\n+        return new UpdateVenueRequest(\n+ org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\n+import org.springframework.data.domain.PageImpl;\n+import org.springframework.data.domain.PageRequest;\n+\n+@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\n+class VenueServiceTest {\n+\n+    @Mock\n+    private VenueRepository venueRepository;\n+    @Mock\n+    private CityRepository cityRepository;\n+    @Mock\n+    private VenueMapper venueMapper;\n+  void should_persist_venue_and_set_SYNCED_when_EB_creation_succeeds() {\n+        CreateVenueRequest request = baseCreateRequest();\n+        Venue venue = baseVenue();\n+        when(cityRepository.existsById(request.cityId())).thenReturn(true);\n+        when(venueRepository.findByOrganizationIdAndCityId(eq(1L), eq(request.cityId()), any(PageRequest.class)))\n+            .thenReturn(new PageImpl<>(List.of()));\n+        when(venueMapper.toEntity(1L, request)).thenReturn(venue);\n+        when(venueRepository.save(venue)).thenReturn(venue);\n+ venueService.createVenue(1L, request);\n+\n+        assertThat(result.getSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(VenueSyncStatus.SYNCED);\n+        assertThat(result.getEventbriteVenueId()).isEqualTo(\"eb-1\");\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_persist_venue_and_return_202_when_EB_create_fails() {\n+        CreateVenueRequest request = baseCreateRequest();\n+        Venue venue = baseVenue();\n+        when(cityRepository.existsById(request.cityId())).thenReturn(true);\n+        when(venueRepository.findByOrganizationIdAndCityId(eq(1L), eq(request.cityId()), any(PageRequest.class)))\n+            .thenReturn(new PageImpl<>(List.of()));\n+        when(venueMapper.toEntity(1L, request)).thenReturn(venue);\n+        when(venueRepository.save(venue)).thenReturn(venue);\n+        when(ebVenueService.createVenue(eq(1L), any()))\n+            .thenThrow(new EbIntegrationException(\"boom\"));\n+\n+        Venue result = venueService.createVenue(1L, request);\n+\n+        assertThat(result.getSyncStatus()).isEqualTo(VenueSyncStatus.PENDING_SYNC);\n+        assertThat(result.getLastSyncError()).isNotNull();\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_update_venue_and_call_updateVenue_when_eb_venue_id_present() {\n+        UpdateVenueRequest request = baseUpdateRequest();\n+        Venue venue = baseVenue();\n+        venue.markSynced(\"eb-1\");\n+        when(venueRepository.findById(10L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(venue));\n+        when(venueRepository.save(venue)).thenReturn(venue);\n+        when(ebVenueService.updateVenue(eq(1L), eq(\"eb-1\"), any()))\n+            .thenReturn(new EbVenueResponse(\"eb-1\", \"Venue\", \"Addr\", \"City\", \"IN\", \"123\", null, null));\n+\n+        Venue ```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:15:41.192Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_suFinndpXVXUv96BNKtCOFCW",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: admin/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/admin/service/OrgOAuthServiceTest.java\n+package com.eventplatform.admin.service;\n+\n+import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\n+import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThatThrownBy;\n+import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.eq;\n+import static org.mockito.Mockito.verify;\n+import static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\n+\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.ValidationException;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrganizationAuth;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service.EbTokenStore;\n+import java.lang.reflect.Constructor;\n+import java.lang.reflect.Field;\n+import java.net.URI;\n+import java.time.Duration;\n+import java.time.Instant;\n+import java.util.Map;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\n+import org.mockito.InjectMocks;\n+import org.mockito.Mock;\n+import org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\n+\n+@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\n+class OrgOAuthServiceTest {\n+\n+    @Mock\n+    private EbTokenStore tokenStore;\n+\n+    @InjectMocks\n+    private OrgOAuthService orgOAuthService = new OrgOAuthService(tokenStore, \"client-id\", \"http://callback\");\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_generate_authorization_url_and_store_csrf_state() throws Exception {\n+        String url = orgOAuthService.buildAuthorizationUrl(1L);\n+        String state = extractState(url);\n+\n+        Map<String, ?> stateStore = getStateStore();\n+\n+        assertThat(stateStore).containsKey(state);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_call_exchangeAndStore_and_return_CONNECTED_when_code_and_state_valid() throws Exception {\n+        String url = orgOAuthService.buildAuthorizationUrl(1L);\n+        String state = extractState(url);\n+        OrganizationAuth auth = new OrganizationAuth(1L, \"eb-org\", \"token\");\n+        when(tokenStore.connectOrganization(eq(1L), eq(\"code\"), eq(\"http://callback\"))).thenReturn(auth);\n+\n+        OrganizationAuth result = orgOAuthService.handleCallback(1L, \"code\", state);\n+\n+        assertThat(result).isEqualTo(auth);\n+        verify(tokenStore).connectOrganization(1L, \"code\", \"http://callback\");\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_throw_ValidationException_when_csrf_state_invalid_or_expired() {\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> orgOAuthService.handleCallback(1L, \"code\", \"bad-state\"))\n+            .isInstanceOf(ValidationException.class);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_throw_ValidationException_when_csrf_state_expired() throws Exception {\n+        String url = orgOAuthService.buildAuthorizationUrl(1L);\n+        String state = extractState(url);\n+        Map<String, Object> stateStore = getStateStore();\n+        stateStore.put(state, newStateEntry(1L, Instant.now().minus(Duration.ofMinutes(11))));\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> orgOAuthService.handleCallback(1L, \"code\", state))\n+            .isInstanceOf(ValidationException.class);\n+    }\n+\n+    private String extractState(String url) {\n+        String query = URI.create(url).getQuery();\n+        for (String part : query.split(\"&\")) {\n+            if (part.startsWith(\"state=\")) {\n+                return part.substring(\"state=\".length());\n+            }\n+        }\n+        throw new IllegalStateException(\"state not found\");\n+    }\n+\n+    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n+    private Map<String, Object> getStateStore() throws Exception {\n+        Field field = OrgOAuthService.class.getDeclaredField(\"stateStore\");\n+        field.setAccessible(true);\n+        return (Map<String, Object>) field.get(orgOAuthService);\n+    }\n+\n+    private Object newStateEntry(Long orgId, Instant createdAt) throws Exception {\n+        Class<?> entryClass = Class.forName(\"com.eventplatform.admin.service.OrgOAuthService$StateEntry\");\n+        Constructor<?> ctor = entryClass.getDeclaredConstructor(Long.class, Instant.class);\n+        ctor.setAccessible(true);\n+        return ctor.newInstance(orgId, createdAt);\n+    }\n+}\n*** End Patch"
  }
}

    "text": "**Planning token store test cases**\n\nI'm outlining tests for the token store using MockitoExtension, focusing on token decryption for valid tokens and token refresh with mock repository, cipher, and OAuth client behaviors.   }
}

## Entry 573
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-03T11:16:18.478Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-03T11:16:18.478Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_XsIyxb994be70NOOcbv3lTkx",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: shared/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/EbTokenStoreTest.java\n+package com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\n+\n+import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\n+import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThatThrownBy;\n+import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.any;\n+import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.eq;\n+import static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\n+\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrganizationAuth;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrgAuthStatus;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbOAuthTokenResponse;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbAuthException;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.repository.OrganizationAuthRepository;\n+import java.time.Instant;\n+import java.util.Optional;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\n+import org.mockito.InjectMocks;\n+import org.mockito.Mock;\n+import org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\n+\n+@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\n+class EbTokenStoreTest {\n+\n+    @Mock\n+    private OrganizationAuthRepository repository;\n+    @Mock\n+    private EbOAuthClient oauthClient;\n+    @Mock\n+    private TokenCipher tokenCipher;\n+\n+    @InjectMocks\n+    private EbTokenStore tokenStore;\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_return_decrypted_access_token_when_token_valid() {\n+        OrganizationAuth auth = new OrganizationAuth(1L, \"eb-org\", \"enc\");\n+        auth.markConnected(\"enc\", \"ref\", Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600));\n+        when(repository.findByOrganizationId(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(auth));\n+        when(tokenCipher.decrypt(\"enc\")).thenReturn(\"access\");\n+\n+        String token = tokenStore.getAccessToken(1L);\n+\n+        assertThat(token).isEqualTo(\"access\");\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_update_token_and_return_new_access_token_after_successful_refresh() {\n+        OrganizationAuth auth = new OrganizationAuth(1L, \"eb-org\", \"enc\");\n+        auth.markConnected(\"enc\", \"refEnc\", Instant.now().plusSeconds(10));\n+        when(repository.findByOrganizationId(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(auth));\n+        when(tokenCipher.decrypt(\"refEnc\")).thenReturn(\"refresh\");\n+        when(oauthClient.refreshToken(\"refresh\"))\n+            .thenReturn(new EbOAuthTokenResponse(\"newAccess\", \"newRefresh\", Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600), \"eb-org\"));\n+        when(tokenCipher.encrypt(\"newAccess\")).thenReturn(\"newEnc\");\n+        when(tokenCipher.encrypt(\"newRefresh\")).thenReturn(\"newRefreshEnc\");\n+        when(tokenCipher.decrypt(\"newEnc\")).thenReturn(\"newAccess\");\n+\n+        String token = tokenStore.getAccessToken(1L);\n+\n+        assertThat(token).isEqualTo(\"newAccess\");\n+        assertThat(auth.getStatus()).isEqualTo(OrgAuthStatus.CONNECTED);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_set_status_TOKEN_EXPIRED_and_throw_EbAuthException_when_refresh_fails() {\n+        OrganizationAuth auth = new OrganizationAuth(1L, \"eb-org\", \"enc\");\n+        auth.markConnected(\"enc\", \"refEnc\", Instant.now().plusSeconds(10));\n+        when(repository.findByOrganizationId(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(auth));\n+        when(tokenCipher.decrypt(\"refEnc\")).thenReturn(\"refresh\");\n+        when(oauthClient.refreshToken(\"refresh\")).thenThrow(new RuntimeException(\"boom\"));\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> tokenStore.getAccessToken(1L))\n+            .isInstanceOf(EbAuthException.class);\n+        assertThat(auth.getStatus()).isEqualTo(OrgAuthStatus.TOKEN_EXPIRED);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_throw_EbAuthException_immediately_when_status_is_REVOKED() {\n+        OrganizationAuth auth = new OrganizationAuth(1L, \"eb-org\", \"enc\");\n+        auth.markRevoked();\n+        when(repository.findByOrganizationId(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(auth));\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> tokenStore.getAccessToken(1L))\n+            .isInstanceOf(EbAuthException.class);\n+    }\n+}\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: shared/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/shared/eventbrite/service/EbTokenStoreTest.java\n+package com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.service;\n+\n+import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\n+import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThatThrownBy;\n+import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.any;\n+import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.eq;\n+import static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\n+\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrganizationAuth;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.domain.OrgAuthStatus;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.dto.EbOAuthTokenResponse;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.exception.EbAuthException;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.eventbrite.repository.OrganizationAuthRepository;\n+import java.time.Instant;\n+import java.util.Optional;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\n+import org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.ExtendWith;\n+import org.mockito.InjectMocks;\n+import org.mockito.Mock;\n+import org.mockito.junit.jupiter.MockitoExtension;\n+\n+@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)\n+class EbTokenStoreTest {\n+\n+    @Mock\n+    private OrganizationAuthRepository repository;\n+    @Mock\n+    private EbOAuthClient oauthClient;\n+    @Mock\n+    private TokenCipher tokenCipher;\n+\n+    @InjectMocks\n+    private EbTokenStore tokenStore;\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_return_decrypted_access_token_when_token_valid() {\n+        OrganizationAuth auth = new OrganizationAuth(1L, \"eb-org\", \"enc\");\n+        auth.markConnected(\"enc\", \"ref\", Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600));\n+        when(repository.findByOrganizationId(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(auth));\n+        when(tokenCipher.decrypt(\"enc\")).thenReturn(\"access\");\n+\n+        String token = tokenStore.getAccessToken(1L);\n+\n+        assertThat(token).isEqualTo(\"access\");\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_update_token_and_return_new_access_token_after_successful_refresh() {\n+        OrganizationAuth auth = new OrganizationAuth(1L, \"eb-org\", \"enc\");\n+        auth.markConnected(\"enc\", \"refEnc\", Instant.now().plusSeconds(10));\n+        when(repository.findByOrganizationId(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(auth));\n+        when(tokenCipher.decrypt(\"refEnc\")).thenReturn(\"refresh\");\n+        when(oauthClient.refreshToken(\"refresh\"))\n+            .thenReturn(new EbOAuthTokenResponse(\"newAccess\", \"newRefresh\", Instant.now().plusSeconds(3600), \"eb-org\"));\n+        when(tokenCipher.encrypt(\"newAccess\")).thenReturn(\"newEnc\");\n+        when(tokenCipher.encrypt(\"newRefresh\")).thenReturn(\"newRefreshEnc\");\n+        when(tokenCipher.decrypt(\"newEnc\")).thenReturn(\"newAccess\");\n+\n+        String token = tokenStore.getAccessToken(1L);\n+\n+        assertThat(token).isEqualTo(\"newAccess\");\n+        assertThat(auth.getStatus()).isEqualTo(OrgAuthStatus.CONNECTED);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_set_status_TOKEN_EXPIRED_and_throw_EbAuthException_when_refresh_fails() {\n+        OrganizationAuth auth = new OrganizationAuth(1L, \"eb-org\", \"enc\");\n+        auth.markConnected(\"enc\", \"refEnc\", Instant.now().plusSeconds(10));\n+        when(repository.findByOrganizationId(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(auth));\n+        when(tokenCipher.decrypt(\"refEnc\")).thenReturn(\"refresh\");\n+        when(oauthClient.refreshToken(\"refresh\")).thenThrow(new RuntimeException(\"boom\"));\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> tokenStore.getAccessToken(1L))\n+            .isInstanceOf(EbAuthException.class);\n+        assertThat(auth.getStatus()).isEqualTo(OrgAuthStatus.TOKEN_EXPIRED);\n+    }\n+\n+    @Test\n+    void should_throw_EbAuthException_immediately_when_status_is_REVOKED() {\n+        OrganizationAuth auth = new OrganizationAuth(1L, \"eb-org\", \"enc\");\n+        auth.markRevoked();\n+        when(repository.findByOrganizationId(1L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(auth));\n+\n+        assertThatThrownBy(() -> tokenStore.getAccessToken(1L))\n+            .isInstanceOf(EbAuthException.class);\n+    }\n+}\n*** End Patch"
  }
}
```

{
